1472:
WITH LAM_consumption_2012 AS (
    SELECT 
        y.CustomerID,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    INNER JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM' 
        AND y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
)
SELECT CustomerID, TotalConsumption
FROM LAM_consumption_2012
WHERE TotalConsumption = (
    SELECT MIN(TotalConsumption) 
    FROM LAM_consumption_2012
);

SELECT 
    c.CustomerID,
    SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
    INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    ym.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
    AND c.Segment = 'LAM'
GROUP BY 
    c.CustomerID
HAVING 
    SUM(ym.Consumption) = (
        SELECT MIN(total)
        FROM (
            SELECT SUM(ym2.Consumption) AS total
            FROM yearmonth ym2
            INNER JOIN customers c2 ON ym2.CustomerID = c2.CustomerID
            WHERE ym2.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
                AND c2.Segment = 'LAM'
            GROUP BY c2.CustomerID
        ) AS subq
    );

SELECT 
    y.CustomerID,
    SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM'
    AND y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
GROUP BY y.CustomerID
HAVING SUM(y.Consumption) = (
    SELECT MIN(Total)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS Total
        FROM yearmonth y2
        JOIN customers c2 ON y2.CustomerID = c2.CustomerID
        WHERE c2.Segment = 'LAM'
            AND y2.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
        GROUP BY y2.CustomerID
    ) AS SubQuery
);

SELECT 
    y.CustomerID,
    SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM'
    AND y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
GROUP BY y.CustomerID
HAVING SUM(y.Consumption) = (
    SELECT MIN(TotalConsumption)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
        FROM yearmonth y2
        JOIN customers c2 ON y2.CustomerID = c2.CustomerID
        WHERE c2.Segment = 'LAM'
            AND y2.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
        GROUP BY y2.CustomerID
    ) AS SubQuery
);

WITH consumption_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        y.CustomerID,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    INNER JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM' 
        AND y.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
)
SELECT CustomerID
FROM consumption_totals
WHERE total_consumption = (
    SELECT MIN(total_consumption) 
    FROM consumption_totals
);

    yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Segment = 'SME'
    AND y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    y.Date
ORDER BY 
    SUM(y.Consumption) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WHERE 
    c.Segment = 'SME'
    AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'

ORDER BY

JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' 
  AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'

1493:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN Consumption > 528.3 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage
FROM yearmonth
WHERE Date = '201202';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        100.0 * 
        SUM(CASE WHEN Consumption > 528.3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 
        COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS percentage
FROM yearmonth
WHERE Date = '201202';

WITH feb_2012_data AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Consumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Date = '201202'
),
total_customers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS total_count
    FROM feb_2012_data
),
high_consumption_customers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS high_count
    FROM feb_2012_data
    WHERE Consumption > 528.3
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_count = 0 THEN 0 
        ELSE ROUND((high_count * 100.0) / total_count, 2) 
    END AS percentage
FROM total_customers, high_consumption_customers;

WITH feb_data AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Consumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Date = '201202'
),
total_customers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS total
    FROM feb_data
),
high_consumption_customers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS high_count
    FROM feb_data
    WHERE Consumption > 528.3
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (SELECT high_count FROM high_consumption_customers) * 100.0 /
        (SELECT total FROM total_customers),
        2
    ) AS percentage
FROM total_customers;

WITH feb_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Consumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Date = '201202'
),
total_customers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS total_count
    FROM feb_customers
),
high_consumption_customers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS high_count
    FROM feb_customers
    WHERE Consumption > 528.3
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_count = 0 THEN 0 
        ELSE ROUND((high_count * 100.0 / total_count), 2) 
    END AS percentage
FROM total_customers, high_consumption_customers;
1482:
WITH consumption_by_segment_year AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
        AND SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4)
),
pivot_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS consumption_2012,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM consumption_by_segment_year
    GROUP BY Segment
),
percentage_change AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        consumption_2012,
        consumption_2013,
        (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) AS increase,
        CASE 
            WHEN consumption_2013 > 0 
            THEN ((consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) / consumption_2013) * 100.0
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS percentage_increase
    FROM pivot_consumption
    WHERE consumption_2012 IS NOT NULL 
        AND consumption_2013 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    consumption_2012,
    consumption_2013,
    increase,
    percentage_increase
FROM percentage_change
ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC;

WITH consumption_by_segment_year AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) AS year,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    INNER JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        AND SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
        AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4)
),
pivoted AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2012' THEN total_consumption END), 0) AS consumption_2012,
        COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2013' THEN total_consumption END), 0) AS consumption_2013
    FROM consumption_by_segment_year
    GROUP BY Segment
),
percentage_change AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        consumption_2012,
        consumption_2013,
        CASE 
            WHEN consumption_2013 = 0 THEN NULL 
            ELSE (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) * 100.0 / consumption_2013 
        END AS percentage_increase
    FROM pivoted
)
SELECT 
    'biggest' AS result_type,
    Segment,
    percentage_increase
FROM percentage_change
WHERE percentage_increase = (SELECT MAX(percentage_increase) FROM percentage_change)
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'lowest',
    Segment,
    percentage_increase
FROM percentage_change
WHERE percentage_increase = (SELECT MIN(percentage_increase) FROM percentage_change);

WITH eur_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM customers c
    INNER JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
        AND SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4)
),
pivot AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS consumption_2012,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM eur_consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
),
changes AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        consumption_2012,
        consumption_2013,
        (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) AS increase,
        (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) * 100.0 / consumption_2013 AS percent_increase
    FROM pivot
    WHERE consumption_2012 IS NOT NULL 
        AND consumption_2013 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    'Biggest Increase' AS Type,
    Segment,
    percent_increase
FROM changes
WHERE percent_increase = (SELECT MAX(percent_increase) FROM changes)
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Lowest Increase' AS Type,
    Segment,
    percent_increase
FROM changes
WHERE percent_increase = (SELECT MIN(percent_increase) FROM changes)
ORDER BY Type DESC;

WITH eur_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Segment
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'EUR' AND Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
),
consumption_by_segment_year AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN eur_customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE Year IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, Year
),
pivot AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS consumption_2012,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM consumption_by_segment_year
    GROUP BY Segment
),
percentage_change AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        consumption_2012,
        consumption_2013,
        (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) AS increase,
        (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) * 100.0 / consumption_2013 AS pct_increase
    FROM pivot
    WHERE consumption_2012 IS NOT NULL 
      AND consumption_2013 IS NOT NULL
      AND consumption_2013 != 0
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    pct_increase AS percentage_increase,
    'Biggest Increase' AS remark
FROM percentage_change
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM percentage_change)
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    Segment,
    pct_increase AS percentage_increase,
    'Lowest Increase' AS remark
FROM percentage_change
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM percentage_change)
ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC;

WITH consumption_by_segment_year AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM customers c
    INNER JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        AND SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
        AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4)
),
pivoted AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN TotalConsumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN TotalConsumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM consumption_by_segment_year
    GROUP BY Segment
),
percentage_change AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        consumption_2012,
        consumption_2013,
        (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) AS increase,
        CASE 
            WHEN consumption_2013 != 0 
            THEN (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) * 100.0 / consumption_2013 
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS percentage_increase
    FROM pivoted
    WHERE consumption_2013 != 0
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    percentage_increase
FROM percentage_change
ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    Segment,
    percentage_increase
FROM percentage_change
ORDER BY percentage_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;

    SELECT Date, SUM(Consumption) AS MonthlyConsumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Date LIKE '2012%'
    GROUP BY Date

1486:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SMEs_CZK,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SMEs_EUR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS More_SMEs_CZK_than_EUR
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'SME';

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'SME' AND Currency = 'CZK') 
    - 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'SME' AND Currency = 'EUR') 
    AS amount_more_SMEs;

WITH SME_currency_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        Currency,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) AS customer_count
    FROM customers
    WHERE Segment = 'SME'
      AND Currency IN ('CZK', 'EUR')
    GROUP BY Currency
),
counts_pivot AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN customer_count ELSE 0 END) AS czk_count,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN customer_count ELSE 0 END) AS eur_count
    FROM SME_currency_counts
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN czk_count > eur_count THEN czk_count - eur_count
        ELSE 0
    END AS more_SMEs_CZK_than_EUR
FROM counts_pivot;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SMEs_CZK,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SMEs_EUR,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS More_SMEs_CZK_than_EUR
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'SME';
1481:
WITH customers_consumption_2013 AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    INNER JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
segment_min_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM customers_consumption_2013
    WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY Segment
),
least_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.CustomerID,
        cc.Segment,
        cc.total_consumption
    FROM customers_consumption_2013 cc
    INNER JOIN segment_min_consumption smc 
        ON cc.Segment = smc.Segment 
        AND cc.total_consumption = smc.min_consumption
),
segment_avg_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        SUM(total_consumption) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS avg_consumption
    FROM least_customers
    GROUP BY Segment
),
averages AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN avg_consumption END) AS avg_sme,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN avg_consumption END) AS avg_lam,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN avg_consumption END) AS avg_kam
    FROM segment_avg_consumption
)
SELECT 
    avg_sme - avg_lam AS diff_SME_LAM,
    avg_lam - avg_kam AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    avg_kam - avg_sme AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM averages;

WITH cus_2013_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    INNER JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
        AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
segment_min_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
    FROM cus_2013_consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
),
lowest_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.CustomerID,
        cc.Segment,
        cc.total_consumption
    FROM cus_2013_consumption cc
    INNER JOIN segment_min_consumption smc 
        ON cc.Segment = smc.Segment 
        AND cc.total_consumption = smc.min_total
),
segment_avg_lowest AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption_lowest
    FROM lowest_customers
    GROUP BY Segment
),
segment_values AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN avg_consumption_lowest END), 0) AS sme_avg,
        COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN avg_consumption_lowest END), 0) AS lam_avg,
        COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN avg_consumption_lowest END), 0) AS kam_avg
    FROM segment_avg_lowest
)
SELECT 
    sme_avg - lam_avg AS diff_SME_LAM,
    lam_avg - kam_avg AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    kam_avg - sme_avg AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM segment_values;

WITH cust_2013 AS (
  SELECT y.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
  FROM yearmonth y
  JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
    AND y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
  GROUP BY y.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT *,
         RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY total_consumption ASC) AS rnk
  FROM cust_2013
),
lowest_per_segment AS (
  SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_annual_consumption
  FROM ranked
  WHERE rnk = 1
  GROUP BY Segment
),
segments AS (
  SELECT Segment, avg_annual_consumption
  FROM lowest_per_segment
  WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segments WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
  (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segments WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
  (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segments WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
  (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segments WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segments WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
  (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segments WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;

WITH czk_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Segment
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'CZK'
),
consumption_2013 AS (
    SELECT y.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    INNER JOIN czk_customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_consumption_per_segment AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
    FROM consumption_2013
    WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY Segment
),
min_customers AS (
    SELECT c.*
    FROM consumption_2013 c
    INNER JOIN min_consumption_per_segment m 
        ON c.Segment = m.Segment AND c.total_consumption = m.min_total
),
segment_avg AS (
    SELECT Segment, 
           SUM(total_consumption) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS avg_annual_consumption
    FROM min_customers
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    'SME' AS Segment1,
    'LAM' AS Segment2,
    (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS Difference
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'LAM' AS Segment1,
    'KAM' AS Segment2,
    (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM')
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'KAM' AS Segment1,
    'SME' AS Segment2,
    (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT avg_annual_consumption FROM segment_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME');

WITH czk_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Segment
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'CZK'
),
consumption_2013 AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY CustomerID
),
czk_consumption AS (
    SELECT c.Segment, cc.CustomerID, cc.total_consumption
    FROM consumption_2013 cc
    JOIN czk_customers c ON cc.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
),
min_consumption_per_segment AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM czk_consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
),
lowest_consumption_customers AS (
    SELECT czk.Segment, czk.CustomerID, czk.total_consumption
    FROM czk_consumption czk
    JOIN min_consumption_per_segment m ON czk.Segment = m.Segment AND czk.total_consumption = m.min_consumption
),
segment_averages AS (
    SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM lowest_consumption_customers
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_averages WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_averages WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_minus_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_averages WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_averages WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_minus_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_averages WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_averages WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_minus_SME;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN total_consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage
FROM (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        COALESCE(SUM(ym.Consumption), 0) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    LEFT JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID
) AS cust_consumption;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ym.Consumption > 46.73 THEN c.CustomerID END) * 100.0) 
    / COUNT(DISTINCT c.CustomerID) AS percentage
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_lam_customers > 0 
        THEN (lam_customers_high_consumption * 100.0) / total_lam_customers 
        ELSE 0 
    END AS percentage
FROM (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.CustomerID) AS total_lam_customers,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN y.Consumption > 46.73 THEN c.CustomerID END) AS lam_customers_high_consumption
    FROM customers c
    LEFT JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM'
) AS counts;

WITH lam_customers AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Segment = 'LAM'
),
lam_with_high_consumption AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.CustomerID
    FROM lam_customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE y.Consumption > 46.73
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lam_customers)) AS percentage
FROM lam_with_high_consumption;

WITH LAM_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID, 
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    LEFT JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN total_consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage
FROM LAM_customers;

     COUNT(DISTINCT cod.CustomerID)) AS percentage_eur_customers

JOIN customers c ON cod.CustomerID = c.CustomerID;

    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN t.CustomerID END) * 100.0) 
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT t.CustomerID), 0) AS percentage_eur_customers

WITH target_customer AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-25'
      AND Price = 634.8
    LIMIT 1
),
consumption_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        tc.CustomerID,
        SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2012-%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2013-%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM target_customer tc
    LEFT JOIN yearmonth y ON tc.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    GROUP BY tc.CustomerID
)
SELECT 
    CustomerID,
    consumption_2012,
    consumption_2013,
    CASE 
        WHEN consumption_2012 = 0 THEN NULL 
        ELSE (consumption_2012 - consumption_2013) / consumption_2012 
    END AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM consumption_summary;

WITH target_customer AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Price = 634.8 AND Date = '2012-08-25'
),
consumption_by_year AS (
    SELECT 
        y.CustomerID,
        SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2012-%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2013-%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM yearmonth y
    INNER JOIN target_customer t ON y.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
)
SELECT 
    CustomerID,
    consumption_2012,
    consumption_2013,
    (consumption_2012 - consumption_2013) / NULLIF(consumption_2012, 0) AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM consumption_by_year;

WITH target_customer AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Price = 634.8
),
consumption_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        y.CustomerID,
        SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM yearmonth y
    WHERE y.CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM target_customer)
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
)
SELECT 
    c.CustomerID,
    c.consumption_2012,
    c.consumption_2013,
    CASE 
        WHEN c.consumption_2012 > 0 
        THEN (c.consumption_2012 - c.consumption_2013) / c.consumption_2012 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM consumption_summary c;

WITH target_customer AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Price = 634.8 AND Date = '2012-08-25'
),
consumption_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        y.CustomerID,
        SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2012-%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2013-%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM yearmonth y
    WHERE y.CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM target_customer)
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
)
SELECT 
    CustomerID,
    consumption_2012,
    consumption_2013,
    (consumption_2012 - consumption_2013) / NULLIF(consumption_2012, 0) AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM consumption_summary;

WITH target_customer AS (
    SELECT CustomerID 
    FROM transactions_1k 
    WHERE Price = 634.8 AND Date = '2012-08-25'
    LIMIT 1
),
consumption_by_year AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2012-%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS total_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date LIKE '2013-%' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS total_2013
    FROM yearmonth y
    WHERE y.CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM target_customer)
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_2012 > 0 THEN (total_2012 - total_2013) / total_2012 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM consumption_by_year;

WITH customer_spending AS (
    SELECT 
        t.CustomerID,
        c.Currency,
        SUM(t.Price) AS total_spent,
        SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS avg_price_per_item
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    GROUP BY t.CustomerID, c.Currency
)
SELECT 
    CustomerID,
    total_spent,
    avg_price_per_item,
    Currency
FROM customer_spending
ORDER BY total_spent DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.CustomerID,
    c.Currency,
    SUM(t.Price * t.Amount) AS total_spent,
    SUM(t.Price * t.Amount) / SUM(t.Amount) AS avg_price_per_item
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY t.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY total_spent DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH customer_spending AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID, 
        SUM(Price) AS total_spent,
        SUM(Amount) AS total_amount
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY CustomerID
),
top_customer AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        total_spent,
        total_amount
    FROM customer_spending
    ORDER BY total_spent DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    tc.CustomerID,
    c.Segment,
    tc.total_spent,
    tc.total_spent / tc.total_amount AS avg_price_per_item,
    c.Currency
FROM top_customer tc
JOIN customers c ON tc.CustomerID = c.CustomerID;

WITH customer_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        SUM(Price) AS total_spent,
        SUM(Amount) AS total_amount
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY CustomerID
),
top_customer AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        total_spent,
        total_amount
    FROM customer_totals
    ORDER BY total_spent DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    tc.CustomerID AS top_spending_customer,
    tc.total_spent AS total_spending,
    tc.total_spent / tc.total_amount AS avg_price_per_single_item,
    c.Currency
FROM top_customer tc
JOIN customers c ON tc.CustomerID = c.CustomerID;

WITH customer_spending AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID, 
        SUM(Price) AS total_spent
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY CustomerID
),
top_customer AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID, 
        total_spent
    FROM customer_spending
    ORDER BY total_spent DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    tc.CustomerID AS top_spending_customer,
    tc.total_spent AS total_spending,
    (SELECT SUM(Price) / SUM(Amount) 
     FROM transactions_1k t 
     WHERE t.CustomerID = tc.CustomerID) AS average_price_per_item,
    c.Currency
FROM top_customer tc
JOIN customers c ON tc.CustomerID = c.CustomerID;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(e.expense_id) = 0 THEN 'Yes' -- No expenses means vacuously true
        WHEN COUNT(e.expense_id) = SUM(CASE WHEN e.approved = 'True' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS all_expenses_approved
FROM event ev
LEFT JOIN budget b ON ev.event_id = b.link_to_event
LEFT JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget
WHERE ev.event_name = 'October Meeting' 
  AND ev.event_date = '2019-10-08';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(e.expense_id) = 0 THEN 'No expenses found'
        WHEN COUNT(e.expense_id) = SUM(CASE WHEN e.approved = 'True' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
        THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS all_approved
FROM event ev
JOIN budget b ON ev.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget
WHERE ev.event_name = 'October Meeting' 
  AND ev.event_date = '2019-10-08';

SELECT 
    e.expense_id,
    e.expense_description,
    e.expense_date,
    e.cost,
    e.approved,
    CASE 
        WHEN e.approved = 'True' THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS approved_yn
FROM event ev
JOIN budget b ON ev.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget
WHERE ev.event_name = 'October Meeting' 
    AND ev.event_date = '2019-10-08'
ORDER BY e.expense_date, e.expense_id;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 
      FROM event e
      JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
      JOIN expense exp ON b.budget_id = exp.link_to_budget
      WHERE e.event_name = 'October Meeting' 
        AND e.event_date = '2019-10-08'
        AND exp.approved != 'True'
    ) THEN 'No' 
    ELSE 'Yes' 
  END AS all_approved;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 
      FROM event e
      JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
      JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget
      WHERE e.event_name = 'October Meeting' 
        AND e.event_date = '2019-10-08'
        AND ex.approved = 'False'
    ) THEN 'No'
    ELSE 'Yes'
  END AS all_expenses_approved;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) AS times_more
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement'
    AND e.event_name IN ('Yearly Kickoff', 'October Meeting');

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END), 0),
    2) AS times_more
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement'
  AND e.event_name IN ('Yearly Kickoff', 'October Meeting');

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END), 0),
    2) AS times_more
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement'
    AND e.event_name IN ('Yearly Kickoff', 'October Meeting');

SELECT 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.amount), 0) 
     FROM budget b 
     JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id 
     WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement' 
       AND e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff') 
    / 
    NULLIF(
        (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.amount), 0) 
         FROM budget b 
         JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id 
         WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement' 
           AND e.event_name = 'October Meeting'), 
        0
    ) AS times_more

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS times_more
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement'
  AND e.event_name IN ('Yearly Kickoff', 'October Meeting');

    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(event.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019' THEN budget.spent ELSE 0 END) -
    SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(event.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020' THEN budget.spent ELSE 0 END) AS spending_difference
FROM budget
INNER JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id
WHERE SUBSTR(event.event_date, 1, 4) IN ('2019', '2020');

SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019' THEN b.spent ELSE 0 END) -
  SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020' THEN b.spent ELSE 0 END) AS spending_difference
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) IN ('2019', '2020');

SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019' THEN b.spent ELSE 0 END) -
  SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020' THEN b.spent ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) IN ('2019', '2020');

SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019' THEN b.spent ELSE 0 END) -
  SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020' THEN b.spent ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) IN ('2019', '2020');

SELECT 
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019' THEN COALESCE(b.spent, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) -
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020' THEN COALESCE(b.spent, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS difference
FROM event e
LEFT JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) IN ('2019', '2020');

1376:
SELECT 
    e.event_id,
    e.event_name,
    SUM(b.spent) AS total_spent,
    SUM(b.amount) AS total_amount,
    SUM(b.spent) * 1.0 / SUM(b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
    AND b.amount > 0
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
HAVING total_amount > 0
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    e.event_name,
    SUM(b.spent) AS total_spent,
    SUM(b.amount) AS total_budget,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(b.amount) > 0 
        THEN SUM(b.spent) * 1.0 / SUM(b.amount) 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
HAVING total_budget > 0
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH event_budget_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        e.event_id,
        e.event_name,
        SUM(b.spent) AS total_spent,
        SUM(b.amount) AS total_amount,
        CASE 
            WHEN SUM(b.amount) > 0 THEN SUM(b.spent) * 1.0 / SUM(b.amount)
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS spend_to_budget_ratio
    FROM event e
    INNER JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
    WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
    GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
)
SELECT 
    event_id,
    event_name,
    total_spent,
    total_amount,
    spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event_budget_totals
WHERE spend_to_budget_ratio IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH event_budget_ratio AS (
    SELECT 
        e.event_id,
        e.event_name,
        CASE 
            WHEN SUM(b.amount) = 0 THEN NULL 
            ELSE SUM(b.spent) * 1.0 / SUM(b.amount) 
        END AS spend_to_budget_ratio
    FROM event e
    INNER JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
    WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
    GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
    HAVING SUM(b.amount) > 0  -- Exclude events with zero total budget to avoid division by zero
)
SELECT 
    event_id,
    event_name,
    spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event_budget_ratio
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    e.event_name,
    SUM(b.spent) AS total_spent,
    SUM(b.amount) AS total_amount,
    SUM(b.spent) * 1.0 / SUM(b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
    AND b.amount IS NOT NULL
    AND b.amount > 0
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

1389:
SELECT 
    e.event_name,
    SUM(exp.cost) AS total_cost
FROM expense exp
JOIN budget b ON exp.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
HAVING total_cost IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY total_cost ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, SUM(exp.cost) AS total_cost
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense exp ON b.budget_id = exp.link_to_budget
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
HAVING SUM(exp.cost) = (
    SELECT MIN(total)
    FROM (
        SELECT SUM(exp2.cost) AS total
        FROM event e2
        JOIN budget b2 ON e2.event_id = b2.link_to_event
        JOIN expense exp2 ON b2.budget_id = exp2.link_to_budget
        GROUP BY e2.event_id
    ) AS event_totals
);

SELECT 
    e.event_name,
    SUM(exp.cost) AS total_cost
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense exp ON b.budget_id = exp.link_to_budget
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY total_cost ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    e.event_name,
    SUM(exp.cost) AS total_cost
FROM 
    event e
    INNER JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
    INNER JOIN expense exp ON b.budget_id = exp.link_to_budget
GROUP BY 
    e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY 
    total_cost ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    e.event_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(exp.cost), 0) AS total_cost
FROM event e
LEFT JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
LEFT JOIN expense exp ON b.budget_id = exp.link_to_budget
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY total_cost ASC
LIMIT 1;

FROM event e

LEFT JOIN expense exp ON b.budget_id = exp.link_to_budget;

SELECT DISTINCT 
    m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name,
    m.phone
FROM 
    member m
JOIN 
    expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE 
    e.cost > (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense);

SELECT DISTINCT 
    m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name,
    m.phone
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense);

WITH overall_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(cost) AS avg_cost
    FROM expense
)
SELECT 
    m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name,
    m.phone AS contact_number
FROM member m
WHERE m.member_id IN (
    SELECT e.link_to_member
    FROM expense e
    CROSS JOIN overall_avg oa
    GROUP BY e.link_to_member
    HAVING MIN(e.cost) > oa.avg_cost
);

SELECT DISTINCT 
    m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name,
    m.phone
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense)
ORDER BY full_name;

WITH overall_avg AS (
    SELECT AVG(cost) AS avg_cost
    FROM expense
)
SELECT 
    m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name,
    m.phone AS contact_number
FROM member m
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM expense e 
    WHERE e.link_to_member = m.member_id
)
AND m.member_id NOT IN (
    SELECT e.link_to_member
    FROM expense e, overall_avg
    WHERE e.cost <= overall_avg.avg_cost
);

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN YEAR(Birthday) > 1930 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage
FROM Patient
WHERE SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN YEAR(Birthday) > 1930 THEN ID END) / COUNT(*),
        2
    ) AS percentage_female_born_after_1930
FROM Patient
WHERE SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN YEAR(Birthday) > 1930 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage
FROM Patient
WHERE SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_female > 0 
        THEN ROUND(100.0 * female_born_after_1930 / total_female, 2)
        ELSE 0 
    END AS percentage
FROM (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Birthday) > 1930 AND SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS female_born_after_1930,
        SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_female
    FROM Patient
) AS counts;

WITH medium_members AS (
    SELECT member_id
    FROM member
    WHERE t_shirt_size = 'Medium' AND position = 'Member'
),
members_with_50 AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id
    FROM medium_members m
    INNER JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
    WHERE i.amount = 50
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members_with_50) * 100.0 / 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM medium_members) AS percentage
FROM medium_members
LIMIT 1;

WITH medium_members AS (
    SELECT member_id
    FROM member
    WHERE t_shirt_size = 'Medium' 
      AND position = 'Member'
),
members_with_income_50 AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id
    FROM member m
    INNER JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
    WHERE m.t_shirt_size = 'Medium' 
      AND m.position = 'Member' 
      AND i.amount = 50
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members_with_income_50) * 100.0 / 
    NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM medium_members), 0) AS percentage
FROM medium_members
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN i.income_id IS NOT NULL THEN m.member_id END) * 100.0) / 
    COUNT(DISTINCT m.member_id) AS percentage
FROM member m
LEFT JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member AND i.amount = 50
WHERE m.t_shirt_size = 'Medium' AND m.position = 'Member';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN i.amount = 50 THEN m.member_id END) * 100.0 / 
     NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT m.member_id), 0)) AS percentage
FROM member m
LEFT JOIN income i ON m.member_id = i.link_to_member
WHERE m.t_shirt_size = 'Medium' AND m.position = 'Member';

SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN i.amount = 50 AND i.source = 'Student_Club' THEN m.member_id END) * 100.0 /
    COUNT(DISTINCT m.member_id) AS percentage
FROM member m

WHERE m.t_shirt_size = 'Medium' AND m.position = 'Member';

WITH male_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inpatient_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_count
    FROM Patient
    WHERE SEX = 'M'
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN inpatient_count > outpatient_count THEN 'in-patient'
        ELSE 'outpatient'
    END AS more_group,
    CASE 
        WHEN outpatient_count > 0 THEN 
            ROUND((inpatient_count * 100.0 / outpatient_count), 2)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS deviation_percentage
FROM male_counts;

WITH male_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS in_patient_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_count
    FROM Patient
    WHERE SEX = 'M'
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN in_patient_count > outpatient_count THEN 'in-patient'
        ELSE 'outpatient'
    END AS more_group,
    CASE 
        WHEN outpatient_count > 0 
        THEN (in_patient_count * 100.0 / outpatient_count) 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS deviation_percentage
FROM male_counts;

WITH male_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inpatient_male,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_male
    FROM Patient
    WHERE SEX = 'M'
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN inpatient_male > outpatient_male THEN 'in-patient'
        WHEN outpatient_male > inpatient_male THEN 'outpatient'
        ELSE 'equal'
    END AS more_group,
    ROUND(
        (CAST(inpatient_male AS REAL) / NULLIF(outpatient_male, 0)) * 100, 
        2
    ) AS percentage_inpatient_to_outpatient
FROM male_counts;

WITH male_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 END) AS in_patient_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 END) AS outpatient_count
  FROM Patient
  WHERE SEX = 'M'
)
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN in_patient_count > outpatient_count THEN 'in-patient'
    ELSE 'outpatient'
  END AS larger_group,
  ROUND(
    ABS(in_patient_count - outpatient_count) * 100.0 / 
    NULLIF(
      CASE 
        WHEN in_patient_count > outpatient_count THEN outpatient_count 
        ELSE in_patient_count 
      END, 
      0
    ), 
    2
  ) AS deviation_percent
FROM male_counts;

WITH male_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inpatient_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_count
  FROM Patient
  WHERE SEX = 'M'
)
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN inpatient_count > outpatient_count THEN 'in-patient'
    ELSE 'outpatient'
  END AS larger_group,
  CASE 
    WHEN inpatient_count > outpatient_count THEN 
      ROUND((inpatient_count - outpatient_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(outpatient_count, 0), 2)
    ELSE 
      ROUND((outpatient_count - inpatient_count) * 100.0 / NULLIF(inpatient_count, 0), 2)
  END AS deviation_percentage
FROM male_counts;

SELECT

    e.Diagnosis
FROM

INNER JOIN

WHERE 
    e.Symptoms IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.Symptoms, e.Diagnosis
FROM Examination e
INNER JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = (
    SELECT MAX(p2.Birthday)
    FROM Patient p2
    INNER JOIN Examination e2 ON p2.ID = e2.ID
)
AND e.Symptoms IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    e.Symptoms, 
    e.Diagnosis 
FROM Examination e
WHERE e.ID = (
    SELECT p.ID 
    FROM Patient p
    WHERE p.ID IN (SELECT ID FROM Examination)
    ORDER BY p.Birthday DESC 
    LIMIT 1
)
AND e.Symptoms IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.Symptoms) AS Symptoms,
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT e.Diagnosis) AS Diagnosis
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = (
    SELECT MAX(p2.Birthday)
    FROM Patient p2
    JOIN Examination e2 ON p2.ID = e2.ID
)
AND e.Symptoms IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    e.Symptoms,
    e.Diagnosis
FROM 
    Patient p
INNER JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE 
    e.Symptoms IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday DESC,
    e.Examination_Date DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    MIN(lab.Date) AS lab_work_date,
    (strftime('%Y', p.FirstDate) - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) AS age_at_arrival
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory lab ON p.ID = lab.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
    AND p.Birthday = (
        SELECT MIN(Birthday) 
        FROM Patient 
        WHERE Diagnosis = 'SJS'
    )
GROUP BY p.ID, p.Birthday, p.FirstDate;

SELECT 
    l.Date AS lab_work_date,
    (strftime('%Y', p.First Date) - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) AS age_at_first_arrival
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.ID = (
    SELECT ID 
    FROM Patient 
    WHERE Diagnosis LIKE '%SJS%'
    ORDER BY Birthday ASC 
    LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY l.Date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    MIN(lab.Date) AS LabWorkDate,
    (strftime('%Y', p.FirstDate) - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) AS AgeAtArrival
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory lab ON p.ID = lab.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
    AND p.Birthday = (
        SELECT MIN(Birthday) 
        FROM Patient 
        WHERE Diagnosis = 'SJS'
    )
GROUP BY p.ID, p.Birthday, p.FirstDate;

WITH OldestSJSPatient AS (
    SELECT ID, Birthday, `First Date`
    FROM Patient
    WHERE Diagnosis = 'SJS'
    ORDER BY Birthday ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    MIN(L.`Date`) AS LabWorkDate,
    YEAR(P.`First Date`) - YEAR(P.Birthday) AS AgeAtArrival
FROM OldestSJSPatient P
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
GROUP BY P.ID, P.Birthday, P.`First Date`;

WITH OldestSJSPatient AS (
    SELECT ID, Birthday, FirstDate
    FROM Patient
    WHERE Diagnosis = 'SJS'
    ORDER BY Birthday ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT MIN(Date) FROM Laboratory WHERE ID = OldestSJSPatient.ID) AS LabDate,
    (strftime('%Y', FirstDate) - strftime('%Y', Birthday)) AS AgeAtArrival
FROM OldestSJSPatient;

SELECT 
    (strftime('%Y', e.`Examination Date`) - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) AS age,

FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID AND l.Date = e.`Examination Date`
WHERE l.HGB = (SELECT MAX(HGB) FROM Laboratory l2 JOIN Examination e2 ON l2.ID = e2.ID AND l2.Date = e2.`Examination Date`)
LIMIT 1;

    e.Diagnosis

JOIN Laboratory l ON e.ID = l.ID AND e.[Examination Date] = l.Date
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.HGB = (
    SELECT MAX(l2.HGB)
    FROM Laboratory l2
    JOIN Examination e2 ON l2.ID = e2.ID AND l2.Date = e2.[Examination Date]

    E.Diagnosis

INNER JOIN Examination E ON L.ID = E.ID AND L.Date = E.`Examination Date`
INNER JOIN Patient P ON L.ID = P.ID

ORDER BY e.`Examination Date` DESC
LIMIT 1;
1169:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0 THEN p.ID END) AS REAL) 
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5 THEN p.ID END), 0) 
    AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM Laboratory l
INNER JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE (p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0) OR (p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5);

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) 
    / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) 
    AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE (p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0) 
   OR (p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0 THEN p.ID END) AS REAL) 
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5 THEN p.ID END), 0) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE (p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0) OR (p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5);

SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0 THEN p.ID END) AS male_abnormal_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5 THEN p.ID END) AS female_abnormal_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5 THEN p.ID END) > 0 
        THEN 1.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0 THEN p.ID END) / 
                    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5 THEN p.ID END)
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE (p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0) OR (p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5);

WITH abnormal_patients AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX
  FROM Laboratory l
  JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
  WHERE (p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0)
     OR (p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5)
)
SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' THEN 1 END) AS male_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS female_count,
  1.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END), 0) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM abnormal_patients;

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN l.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN l.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)
    ) / 
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN l.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END), 0) AS decrease_rate
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
  AND (l.Date LIKE '1981-11-%' OR l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%')
GROUP BY p.ID;

WITH patient_1959 AS (
    SELECT ID
    FROM Patient
    WHERE Birthday = '1959-02-18'
),
cho_nov AS (
    SELECT SUM(lab.`T-CHO`) AS total_cho
    FROM Laboratory lab
    JOIN patient_1959 p ON lab.ID = p.ID
    WHERE lab.Date >= '1981-11-01' AND lab.Date <= '1981-11-30'
),
cho_dec AS (
    SELECT SUM(lab.`T-CHO`) AS total_cho
    FROM Laboratory lab
    JOIN patient_1959 p ON lab.ID = p.ID
    WHERE lab.Date >= '1981-12-01' AND lab.Date <= '1981-12-31'
)
SELECT 
    (cho_nov.total_cho - cho_dec.total_cho) / cho_dec.total_cho AS decrease_rate
FROM cho_nov, cho_dec
WHERE cho_nov.total_cho IS NOT NULL 
  AND cho_dec.total_cho IS NOT NULL
  AND cho_dec.total_cho != 0;

WITH patient_data AS (
    SELECT p.ID
    FROM Patient p
    WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
),
monthly_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', l.Date) = '1981-11' THEN l.`T-CHO` END) AS avg_nov,
        AVG(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', l.Date) = '1981-12' THEN l.`T-CHO` END) AS avg_dec
    FROM Laboratory l
    INNER JOIN patient_data pd ON l.ID = pd.ID
    WHERE (strftime('%Y-%m', l.Date) = '1981-11' OR strftime('%Y-%m', l.Date) = '1981-12')
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN avg_nov IS NOT NULL AND avg_dec IS NOT NULL AND avg_nov > 0 
        THEN (avg_nov - avg_dec) * 1.0 / avg_nov 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS decrease_rate
FROM monthly_avg;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN l.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN l.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END)) * 1.0 /
     NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN l.`T-CHO` END), 0) AS decrease_rate
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
  AND (l.Date LIKE '1981-11-%' OR l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%');

WITH patient_data AS (
    SELECT p.ID
    FROM Patient p
    WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
),
cho_sums AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date BETWEEN '1981-11-01' AND '1981-11-30' THEN l.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS sum_nov,
        SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date BETWEEN '1981-12-01' AND '1981-12-31' THEN l.`T-CHO` ELSE 0 END) AS sum_dec
    FROM Laboratory l
    INNER JOIN patient_data p ON l.ID = p.ID
    WHERE l.Date BETWEEN '1981-11-01' AND '1981-12-31'
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN sum_dec = 0 THEN NULL 
        ELSE (sum_nov - sum_dec) * 1.0 / sum_dec 
    END AS decrease_rate
FROM cho_sums;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM Patient p 
            JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID 
            WHERE p.ID = 57266 
              AND (
                  (p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA > 8.0) 
                  OR (p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > 6.5)
              )
        ) THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS "Within Normal Range"

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM Patient p
      INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
      WHERE p.ID = 57266
        AND (
          (p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA > 8.0)
          OR (p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > 6.5)
        )
    ) THEN 'Yes'
    ELSE 'No'
  END AS "Was the patient's uric acid within normal range?"

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM Patient p
            JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
            WHERE p.ID = 57266
              AND (
                  (p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA > 8.0) 
                  OR (p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > 6.5)
              )
        ) THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS "Within Normal Range"

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM Patient p 
            JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID 
            WHERE p.ID = 57266 
              AND l.UA IS NOT NULL 
              AND (
                  (p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA > 8.0) 
                  OR (p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > 6.5)
              )
        ) THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS "Within Normal Range"

SELECT 
    COALESCE(MAX(
        CASE 
            WHEN (p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA > 8.0) OR (p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > 6.5) THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END
    ), 0) AS within_normal_range
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.ID = 57266
  AND l.UA IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN p.ID END) * 100.0 / 
        COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID), 
        2
    ) AS percentage_female_abnormal_pt
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    DATE_PART('year', AGE(CURRENT_DATE, p.Birthday)) > 55
    AND l.PT >= 14;

WITH PatientsOver55 AS (
    SELECT 
        ID, 
        SEX,
        Birthday
    FROM Patient
    WHERE (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', Birthday)) > 55
),
PatientsWithAbnormalPT AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX
    FROM PatientsOver55 p
    INNER JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
    WHERE l.PT >= 14
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_female_abnormal_pt
FROM PatientsWithAbnormalPT;

WITH PatientsOver55 AS (
    SELECT ID, SEX
    FROM Patient
    WHERE (YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - YEAR(Birthday)) > 55
),
PatientsWithAbnormalPT AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX
    FROM PatientsOver55 p
    JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
    WHERE l.PT >= 14
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / 
     NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) AS percentage_female
FROM PatientsWithAbnormalPT;

WITH PatientsOver55 AS (
    SELECT 
        p.ID,
        p.SEX,
        p.Birthday,
        CASE 
            WHEN EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 
                FROM Laboratory l 
                WHERE l.ID = p.ID 
                AND l.PT >= 14
            ) THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS has_abnormal_pt
    FROM Patient p
    WHERE (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) > 55
)
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' AND has_abnormal_pt = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / 
     NULLIF(SUM(has_abnormal_pt), 0)) AS percentage_female_abnormal_pt
FROM PatientsOver55;

WITH patients_over_55 AS (
    SELECT ID, SEX
    FROM Patient
    WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, Birthday)) > 55
),
patients_abnormal_pt AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX
    FROM patients_over_55 p
    JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
    WHERE l.PT >= 14
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN SEX = 'F' THEN ID END) * 100.0 / 
    NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ID), 0) AS percentage_female_abnormal_pt
FROM patients_abnormal_pt;

SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) AS patients_low_platelet,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS patients_high_platelet,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS difference_low_minus_high
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL 
  AND (PLT <= 100 OR PLT >= 400);

SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) AS patients_with_low_platelet,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS patients_with_high_platelet,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS low_minus_high_difference
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT <= 100 OR PLT >= 400;

SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) AS patients_lower_than_normal,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS patients_higher_than_normal,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS comparison_difference
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL;

WITH abnormal_patients AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ID
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE (PLT <= 100 OR PLT >= 400) AND PLT IS NOT NULL
),
patient_flags AS (
    SELECT 
        ap.ID,
        MAX(CASE WHEN l.PLT < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS had_low,
        MAX(CASE WHEN l.PLT > 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS had_high
    FROM abnormal_patients ap
    JOIN Laboratory l ON ap.ID = l.ID
    WHERE l.PLT IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ap.ID
)
SELECT 
    SUM(had_low) AS patients_with_lower_platelet,
    SUM(had_high) AS patients_with_higher_platelet,
    SUM(had_low) - SUM(had_high) AS difference_lower_minus_higher
FROM patient_flags;

SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) AS patients_with_low_platelet,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS patients_with_high_platelet,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS low_minus_high_difference
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL 
    AND (PLT <= 100 OR PLT >= 400);

WITH AbnormalIgMPatients AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ID
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE IGM <= 40 OR IGM >= 400
)
SELECT Diagnosis, COUNT(*) AS patient_count
FROM Patient
WHERE ID IN (SELECT ID FROM AbnormalIgMPatients)
    AND Diagnosis IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY Diagnosis
ORDER BY patient_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.Diagnosis, COUNT(*) AS diagnosis_count
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.ID IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT l.ID
    FROM Laboratory l
    WHERE l.IGM <= 40 OR l.IGM >= 400
)
GROUP BY p.Diagnosis
ORDER BY diagnosis_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    p.Diagnosis AS disease,
    COUNT(*) AS patient_count
FROM 
    Patient p
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ID
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE IGM <= 40 OR IGM >= 400
) lab ON p.ID = lab.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY p.Diagnosis
ORDER BY patient_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Diagnosis
FROM (
    SELECT p.Diagnosis, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM Patient p
    WHERE p.ID IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT ID
        FROM Laboratory
        WHERE IGM <= 40 OR IGM >= 400
    )
    AND p.Diagnosis IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY p.Diagnosis
) AS diag_counts
WHERE cnt = (
    SELECT MAX(cnt)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM Patient p
        WHERE p.ID IN (
            SELECT DISTINCT ID
            FROM Laboratory
            WHERE IGM <= 40 OR IGM >= 400
        )
        AND p.Diagnosis IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY p.Diagnosis
    ) AS max_counts
);

WITH abnormal_patients AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ID 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE IGM <= 40 OR IGM >= 400
),
diagnosis_counts AS (
    SELECT p.Diagnosis, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM Patient p
    INNER JOIN abnormal_patients ap ON p.ID = ap.ID
    WHERE p.Diagnosis IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY p.Diagnosis
)
SELECT Diagnosis, count
FROM diagnosis_counts
WHERE count = (SELECT MAX(count) FROM diagnosis_counts);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID) AS patient_count
FROM Patient p
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Laboratory l
    WHERE l.ID = p.ID
      AND l.CPK < 250
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Examination e
    WHERE e.ID = p.ID
      AND (e.KCT = '+' OR e.RVVT = '+' OR e.LAC = '+')
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS patient_count
FROM (
    SELECT ID AS patient_id
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE CPK < 250
    INTERSECT
    SELECT ID AS patient_id
    FROM Examination
    WHERE KCT = '+' OR RVVT = '+' OR LAC = '+'
) AS matching_patients;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID) AS patient_count
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.ID IN (
    SELECT l.ID
    FROM Laboratory l
    WHERE l.CPK < 250
      AND l.CPK IS NOT NULL
)
AND p.ID IN (
    SELECT e.ID
    FROM Examination e
    WHERE e.KCT = '+' OR e.RVVT = '+' OR e.LAC = '+'
);

SELECT COUNT(*) AS patient_count
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT ID 
    FROM Laboratory 
    WHERE CPK < 250
    INTERSECT
    SELECT DISTINCT ID 
    FROM Examination 
    WHERE KCT = '+' OR RVVT = '+' OR LAC = '+'
) AS matching_patients;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT lab_patients.ID) AS patient_count
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT ID
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE CPK < 250
) AS lab_patients
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ID
    FROM Examination
    WHERE KCT = '+' OR RVVT = '+' OR LAC = '+'
) AS exam_patients
ON lab_patients.ID = exam_patients.ID;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT lab.ID) AS patient_count
FROM Laboratory lab
WHERE lab.SM IN ('-', '+-')
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Examination ex
    WHERE ex.ID = lab.ID
      AND ex.Thrombosis = 1
  );

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT P.ID) AS Patient_Count
FROM Patient P
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Laboratory L
    WHERE L.ID = P.ID
      AND L.SM IN ('-', '+-')
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Examination E
    WHERE E.ID = P.ID
      AND E.Thrombosis = 0
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT lab.ID) AS patient_count
FROM Laboratory lab
WHERE lab.SM IN ('-', '+-')
  AND lab.ID IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT ex.ID
      FROM Examination ex
      WHERE ex.Thrombosis = 0
  );

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT L.ID) AS patient_count
FROM Laboratory L
WHERE L.SM IN ('-', '+-')
  AND L.ID NOT IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT E.ID
      FROM Examination E
      WHERE E.Thrombosis = 1
  );

SELECT COUNT(*)  
FROM (  
    SELECT Lab.ID  
    FROM Laboratory AS Lab  
    INNER JOIN Examination AS Ex ON Lab.ID = Ex.ID  
    WHERE Lab.SM IN ('-', '+-')  
    GROUP BY Lab.ID  
    HAVING MAX(Ex.Thrombosis) = 0  
) AS NormalSM_NoThrombosis;

    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
      AND Laboratory.SC170 IN ('negative', '0')
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Examination
    WHERE Examination.ID = Patient.ID
      AND Examination.Symptoms IS NULL
  );

FROM Patient
INNER JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID AND Laboratory.SC170 IN ('negative', '0')
INNER JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID AND Examination.Symptoms IS NULL
WHERE Patient.SEX = 'F';

FROM Patient
INNER JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID
LEFT JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE Laboratory.SC170 IN ('negative', '0')
  AND Patient.SEX = 'F'
  AND Examination.Symptoms IS NULL;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Patient.ID) AS Female_Normal_AntiScl70_No_Symptoms_Count
FROM Patient
INNER JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID AND Laboratory.SC170 IN ('negative', '0')
INNER JOIN Examination ON Patient.ID = Examination.ID AND Examination.Symptoms IS NULL
WHERE Patient.Sex = 'F';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Patient.ID) AS Female_NoSymptoms_NormalAntiScl70_Count

      FROM Laboratory
      WHERE Laboratory.ID = Patient.ID
        AND Laboratory.SC170 IN ('negative', '0')
  )
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM Examination
      WHERE Examination.ID = Patient.ID
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM Examination
      WHERE Examination.ID = Patient.ID
        AND Examination.Symptoms IS NOT NULL
  );

SELECT 
    t.team_long_name,
    COUNT(*) AS away_wins
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Team t ON m.away_team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE l.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
    AND m.season = '2009/2010'
    AND m.away_team_goal > m.home_team_goal
GROUP BY m.away_team_api_id
ORDER BY away_wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH AwayWinCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        m.away_team_api_id,
        COUNT(*) AS away_wins
    FROM Match m
    JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
    WHERE l.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
      AND m.season = '2009/2010'
      AND m.away_team_goal > m.home_team_goal
    GROUP BY m.away_team_api_id
)
SELECT t.team_long_name
FROM AwayWinCounts awc
JOIN Team t ON awc.away_team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE awc.away_wins = (SELECT MAX(away_wins) FROM AwayWinCounts);

WITH away_wins AS (
    SELECT 
        m.away_team_api_id,
        COUNT(*) AS wins
    FROM Match m
    JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
    WHERE l.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
      AND m.season = '2009/2010'
      AND m.away_team_goal > m.home_team_goal
    GROUP BY m.away_team_api_id
)
SELECT t.team_long_name
FROM away_wins aw
JOIN Team t ON aw.away_team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE aw.wins = (SELECT MAX(wins) FROM away_wins);

SELECT 
    t.team_long_name
FROM 
    Match m
JOIN 
    League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN 
    Team t ON m.away_team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE 
    l.name = 'Scotland Premier League' 
    AND m.season = '2009/2010'
    AND m.away_team_goal > m.home_team_goal
GROUP BY 
    m.away_team_api_id
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    t.team_long_name,
    COUNT(*) AS away_wins
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Team t ON m.away_team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE l.name = 'Scotland Premier League'
    AND m.season = '2009/2010'
    AND m.away_team_goal > m.home_team_goal
GROUP BY m.away_team_api_id, t.team_long_name
ORDER BY away_wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday)) - 
    (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.birthday)) AS age
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97 
    AND strftime('%Y', pa.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'
GROUP BY p.player_api_id, p.player_name, p.birthday
ORDER BY age;

SELECT DISTINCT 
    p.player_name,
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday)) - 
    (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.birthday)) AS age
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97
    AND strftime('%Y', pa.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'
ORDER BY age;

SELECT 
    DISTINCT p.player_api_id,
    p.player_name,
    p.birthday,
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday)) - 
    (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.birthday)) AS age
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97 
    AND pa.date >= '2013-01-01' 
    AND pa.date <= '2015-12-31'
ORDER BY age;

SELECT DISTINCT 
    p.player_api_id,
    p.player_name,
    (CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS INTEGER) - 
        (CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', p.birthday) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS age
FROM Player p
INNER JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97 
    AND CAST(strftime('%Y', pa.date) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 2013 AND 2015
ORDER BY p.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    ROUND((julianday('now') - julianday(p.birthday)) / 365.25, 2) AS age_years
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97 
    AND strftime('%Y', pa.date) BETWEEN '2013' AND '2015'
GROUP BY p.player_api_id
ORDER BY age_years DESC;

SELECT 
    t.team_long_name AS team_name,
    MAX(ta.buildUpPlaySpeed) AS build_up_play_speed
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE ta.buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ta.team_api_id, t.team_long_name
ORDER BY build_up_play_speed DESC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT 
    t.team_long_name AS team_name,
    MAX(ta.buildUpPlaySpeed) AS build_up_play_speed
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
GROUP BY ta.team_api_id, t.team_long_name
ORDER BY build_up_play_speed DESC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT 
    t.team_long_name AS team_name,
    sub.max_speed AS buildUpPlaySpeed
FROM (
    SELECT 
        team_api_id,
        MAX(buildUpPlaySpeed) AS max_speed
    FROM Team_Attributes
    GROUP BY team_api_id
) sub
JOIN Team t ON sub.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
ORDER BY sub.max_speed DESC
LIMIT 4;

    t.team_long_name AS team_name,

GROUP BY ta.team_api_id
ORDER BY speed_in_which_attacks_are_put_together DESC
LIMIT 4;

WHERE strftime('%Y', ta.date) = '2012'
  AND ta.buildUpPlayPassing IS NOT NULL
  AND ta.buildUpPlayPassing > (
    SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing)
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '2012'
      AND buildUpPlayPassing IS NOT NULL
  )
ORDER BY t.team_long_name;

      SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing)
      FROM Team_Attributes
      WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '2012'
        AND buildUpPlayPassing IS NOT NULL
  );

WITH avg_build_up AS (
    SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing) AS avg_passing
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '2012'
        AND buildUpPlayPassing IS NOT NULL
),
latest_attrs AS (
    SELECT team_api_id, MAX(date) AS latest_date
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '2012'
    GROUP BY team_api_id
)
SELECT DISTINCT t.team_long_name
FROM Team_Attributes ta
INNER JOIN latest_attrs la ON ta.team_api_id = la.team_api_id AND ta.date = la.latest_date
INNER JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
CROSS JOIN avg_build_up ab
WHERE ta.buildUpPlayPassing > ab.avg_passing
ORDER BY t.team_long_name;

SELECT DISTINCT t.team_long_name
FROM Team_Attributes ta
JOIN Team t ON ta.team_api_id = t.team_api_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', ta.date) = '2012'
  AND ta.buildUpPlayPassing > (
      SELECT AVG(buildUpPlayPassing)
      FROM Team_Attributes
      WHERE strftime('%Y', date) = '2012'
        AND buildUpPlayPassing IS NOT NULL
  )
ORDER BY t.team_long_name;

SELECT 
    AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN pa.ball_control END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN pa.ball_control END) AS difference_avg_ball_control
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name IN ('Abdou Diallo', 'Aaron Appindangoye')
    AND pa.ball_control IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN pa.ball_control END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN pa.ball_control END) AS ball_control_diff
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(ball_control) 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') 
    - 
    (SELECT AVG(ball_control) 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye') 
AS difference_avg_ball_control;

SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(pa.ball_control) 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo')

    (SELECT AVG(pa.ball_control) 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa

     WHERE p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye')

FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name IN ('Abdou Diallo', 'Aaron Appindangoye');
