1058:
WITH player_avg_finishing AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_api_id,
        p.height,
        AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
    FROM Player p
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE pa.finishing IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY p.player_api_id, p.height
),
height_extremes AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(height) AS max_height,
        MIN(height) AS min_height
    FROM Player
),
tallest_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        'highest' AS player_group,
        AVG(paf.avg_finishing) AS group_avg_finishing
    FROM player_avg_finishing paf
    CROSS JOIN height_extremes he
    WHERE paf.height = he.max_height
),
shortest_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        'shortest' AS player_group,
        AVG(paf.avg_finishing) AS group_avg_finishing
    FROM player_avg_finishing paf
    CROSS JOIN height_extremes he
    WHERE paf.height = he.min_height
)
SELECT 
    player_group,
    group_avg_finishing
FROM (
    SELECT * FROM tallest_avg
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM shortest_avg
) AS groups
ORDER BY group_avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH HeightGroups AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_api_id,
        p.height,
        CASE 
            WHEN p.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player) THEN 'Tallest Players'
            WHEN p.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player) THEN 'Shortest Players'
        END AS height_group
    FROM Player p
    WHERE p.height IN (
        (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player),
        (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
    )
),
FinishingAverages AS (
    SELECT 
        hg.height_group,
        AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
    FROM HeightGroups hg
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON hg.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE pa.finishing IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY hg.height_group
)
SELECT 
    height_group AS "Player Group",
    ROUND(avg_finishing, 2) AS "Average Finishing"
FROM FinishingAverages
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH height_extremes AS (
    SELECT MAX(height) AS max_height, MIN(height) AS min_height
    FROM Player
),
tallest_players AS (
    SELECT p.player_api_id
    FROM Player p, height_extremes
    WHERE p.height = height_extremes.max_height
),
shortest_players AS (
    SELECT p.player_api_id
    FROM Player p, height_extremes
    WHERE p.height = height_extremes.min_height
),
avg_finishing_tallest AS (
    SELECT AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finish
    FROM tallest_players tp
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON tp.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE pa.finishing IS NOT NULL
),
avg_finishing_shortest AS (
    SELECT AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finish
    FROM shortest_players sp
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON sp.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE pa.finishing IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COALESCE(t.avg_finish, 0) >= COALESCE(s.avg_finish, 0) 
            THEN 'highest'
        ELSE 'shortest'
    END AS player_group,
    COALESCE(t.avg_finish, s.avg_finish) AS average_finishing_rate
FROM avg_finishing_tallest t
CROSS JOIN avg_finishing_shortest s
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.avg_finish, 0) >= COALESCE(s.avg_finish, 0) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH height_extremes AS (
    SELECT MAX(height) AS max_height, MIN(height) AS min_height
    FROM Player
),
candidate_players AS (
    SELECT p.player_api_id, p.player_name, p.height
    FROM Player p, height_extremes he
    WHERE p.height = he.max_height OR p.height = he.min_height
),
player_avg_finishing AS (
    SELECT cp.player_api_id, cp.player_name, cp.height,
           AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
    FROM candidate_players cp
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON cp.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE pa.finishing IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY cp.player_api_id, cp.player_name, cp.height
)
SELECT player_name, height, avg_finishing
FROM player_avg_finishing
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH player_avg_finishing AS (
    SELECT 
        player_api_id,
        AVG(finishing) AS avg_finish
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE finishing IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY player_api_id
),
player_heights AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_api_id,
        p.player_name,
        p.height,
        paf.avg_finish
    FROM Player p
    INNER JOIN player_avg_finishing paf ON p.player_api_id = paf.player_api_id
),
max_height AS (
    SELECT MAX(height) AS max_h FROM Player
),
min_height AS (
    SELECT MIN(height) AS min_h FROM Player
),
tallest_player AS (
    SELECT 
        player_api_id,
        player_name,
        height,
        avg_finish
    FROM player_heights
    WHERE height = (SELECT max_h FROM max_height)
    ORDER BY avg_finish DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
shortest_player AS (
    SELECT 
        player_api_id,
        player_name,
        height,
        avg_finish
    FROM player_heights
    WHERE height = (SELECT min_h FROM min_height)
    ORDER BY avg_finish DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    player_api_id,
    player_name,
    height,
    avg_finish
FROM (
    SELECT * FROM tallest_player
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM shortest_player
) AS candidates
ORDER BY avg_finish DESC
LIMIT 1;
1037:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN p.player_api_id END) * 100.0) 
    / COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_api_id) AS percentage_left_foot
FROM Player p
INNER JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE CAST(strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1987 AND 1992;

WITH players_with_foot AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_api_id,
        pa.preferred_foot
    FROM Player p
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT 
            player_api_id,
            preferred_foot,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_api_id ORDER BY date DESC) AS rn
        FROM Player_Attributes
        WHERE preferred_foot IS NOT NULL
    ) pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id AND pa.rn = 1
    WHERE strftime('%Y', p.birthday) BETWEEN '1987' AND '1992'
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_players,
    SUM(CASE WHEN preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS left_footed_players,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*) AS percentage_left_footed
FROM players_with_foot;

WITH latest_attrs AS (
    SELECT 
        player_api_id, 
        preferred_foot,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_api_id ORDER BY date DESC) AS rn
    FROM Player_Attributes
)
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN la.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*) AS percentage_left_footed
FROM Player p
INNER JOIN latest_attrs la ON p.player_api_id = la.player_api_id AND la.rn = 1
WHERE CAST(strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1987 AND 1992;

WITH player_latest_attributes AS (
    SELECT 
        pa.player_api_id, 
        pa.preferred_foot
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT 
            player_api_id, 
            MAX(date) AS max_date
        FROM Player_Attributes
        GROUP BY player_api_id
    ) latest ON pa.player_api_id = latest.player_api_id AND pa.date = latest.max_date
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN pla.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_left_foot
FROM Player p
LEFT JOIN player_latest_attributes pla ON p.player_api_id = pla.player_api_id
WHERE CAST(strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1987 AND 1992;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN p.player_api_id END) * 100.0) / 
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_api_id) AS percentage_left_foot
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE CAST(strftime('%Y', birthday) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1987 AND 1992;

    ta.chanceCreationPassingClass AS classification
FROM Team t
JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'Ajax'
GROUP BY ta.chanceCreationPassingClass
ORDER BY highest_chance_creation_passing_score DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MIN(pa.date) AS first_date
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
  AND pa.crossing = (
    SELECT MAX(crossing)
    FROM Player_Attributes pa2
    JOIN Player p2 ON pa2.player_api_id = p2.player_api_id
    WHERE p2.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
  );

    SELECT MAX(pa.crossing) AS max_cross
    FROM Player p
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE p.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
)
SELECT pa.date
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
  AND pa.crossing = (SELECT max_cross FROM max_crossing)
ORDER BY pa.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH ariel AS (
    SELECT overall_rating
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
    WHERE p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk'
    ORDER BY pa.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
paulin AS (
    SELECT overall_rating
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id

    ORDER BY pa.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT

FROM ariel, paulin;

SELECT

    ORDER BY pa.date DESC

    ((SELECT overall_rating 
      FROM Player_Attributes pa 
      JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
      WHERE p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk' 
      ORDER BY pa.date DESC LIMIT 1) 
     - 
     (SELECT overall_rating 
      FROM Player_Attributes pa 
      JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
      WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' 
      ORDER BY pa.date DESC LIMIT 1)

    (SELECT overall_rating 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel' 
     ORDER BY pa.date DESC LIMIT 1)

    FROM Player_Attributes
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT player_api_id) AS player_count
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE crossing = (SELECT max_crossing FROM max_crossing_value)
  AND preferred_foot = 'left';

    SELECT player_api_id, crossing
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE preferred_foot = 'left'

    SELECT MAX(crossing) AS max_crossing
    FROM left_footed
)

FROM left_footed
WHERE crossing = (SELECT max_crossing FROM max_crossing_value);

1115:
WITH ratings AS (
  SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    pa.overall_rating
  FROM Player p
  JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
  WHERE p.player_name IN ('Landon Donovan', 'Jordan Bowery')
    AND pa.date = '2013-07-12'
)
SELECT 
  ((MAX(CASE WHEN player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN overall_rating END) -
    MAX(CASE WHEN player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' THEN overall_rating END)) 
   * 100.0 /
   MAX(CASE WHEN player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN overall_rating END)) AS percentage_higher
FROM ratings;

WITH donovan AS (
    SELECT pa.overall_rating
    FROM Player p
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
      AND pa.date = '2013-07-12'
),
bowery AS (
    SELECT pa.overall_rating
    FROM Player p
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
      AND pa.date = '2013-07-12'
)
SELECT 
    (donovan.overall_rating - bowery.overall_rating) * 100.0 / donovan.overall_rating AS percentage_higher
FROM donovan, bowery;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN pa.overall_rating END) - 
         MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' THEN pa.overall_rating END)
        ) * 100.0 / 
        MAX(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN pa.overall_rating END),
        2
    ) AS percentage_higher
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE pa.date = '2013-07-12'
    AND p.player_name IN ('Landon Donovan', 'Jordan Bowery');

WITH ratings AS (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT pa.overall_rating 
         FROM Player_Attributes pa 
         JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
         WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' 
           AND pa.date = '2013-07-12') AS ld_rating,
        (SELECT pa.overall_rating 
         FROM Player_Attributes pa 
         JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
         WHERE p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' 
           AND pa.date = '2013-07-12') AS jb_rating
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN ld_rating IS NOT NULL AND jb_rating IS NOT NULL 
        THEN ROUND(((ld_rating - jb_rating) * 100.0) / ld_rating, 2)
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS percentage_higher
FROM ratings;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        ((landon_rating - jordan_rating) * 100.0 / landon_rating), 
        2
    ) AS percentage_higher
FROM (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT overall_rating 
         FROM Player_Attributes pa 
         JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
         WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' 
           AND pa.date = '2013-07-12'
        ) AS landon_rating,
        (SELECT overall_rating 
         FROM Player_Attributes pa 
         JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
         WHERE p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' 
           AND pa.date = '2013-07-12'
        ) AS jordan_rating
) ratings;

SELECT 
    (SELECT jumping 
     FROM Player_Attributes 
     WHERE player_api_id = 6 
     ORDER BY date DESC 
     LIMIT 1) 
    - 
    (SELECT jumping 
     FROM Player_Attributes 
     WHERE player_api_id = 23 
     ORDER BY date DESC 
     LIMIT 1) 
    AS jumping_difference;

SELECT 
    (SELECT jumping FROM Player_Attributes WHERE id = 6 ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) 
    - 
    (SELECT jumping FROM Player_Attributes WHERE id = 23 ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) 
    AS jumping_difference;

SELECT 
    (SELECT jumping 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.id = 6 
     ORDER BY pa.date DESC 
     LIMIT 1) 
    - 
    (SELECT jumping 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.id = 23 
     ORDER BY pa.date DESC 
     LIMIT 1) 
    AS difference;

SELECT 
    (SELECT jumping FROM Player_Attributes WHERE id = 6) - 
    (SELECT jumping FROM Player_Attributes WHERE id = 23) 
    AS difference;

SELECT DISTINCT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE preferred_foot = 'right'
  AND potential = (
    SELECT MIN(potential)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE preferred_foot = 'right'
  )
LIMIT 4;

WITH LatestAttributes AS (
    SELECT 
        player_api_id,
        potential,
        preferred_foot,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_api_id ORDER BY date DESC) AS rn
    FROM Player_Attributes
)
SELECT 
    player_api_id
FROM LatestAttributes
WHERE rn = 1 
    AND preferred_foot = 'right'
ORDER BY potential ASC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT DISTINCT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE preferred_foot = 'right'
  AND potential = (
    SELECT MIN(potential)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE preferred_foot = 'right'
  )
LIMIT 4;

WITH LatestAttributes AS (
    SELECT 
        player_api_id,
        potential,
        preferred_foot,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_api_id ORDER BY date DESC) AS rn
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE potential IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    player_api_id AS player_id
FROM LatestAttributes
WHERE rn = 1 
    AND preferred_foot = 'right'
ORDER BY potential ASC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT DISTINCT player_api_id
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE preferred_foot = 'right'
  AND potential = (
    SELECT MIN(potential)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE preferred_foot = 'right'
  )
ORDER BY player_api_id
LIMIT 4;
1139:
SELECT 
    t_home.team_long_name AS home_team,
    t_away.team_long_name AS away_team,
    m.home_team_goal,
    m.away_team_goal
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Team t_home ON m.home_team_api_id = t_home.team_api_id
JOIN Team t_away ON m.away_team_api_id = t_away.team_api_id
WHERE l.name = 'Belgium Jupiler League'
    AND m.date LIKE '2008-09-24%';

SELECT 
    home.team_long_name AS home_team,
    away.team_long_name AS away_team,
    m.home_team_goal,
    m.away_team_goal
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Team home ON m.home_team_api_id = home.team_api_id
JOIN Team away ON m.away_team_api_id = away.team_api_id
WHERE l.name = 'Belgium Jupiler League'
    AND m.date LIKE '2008-09-24%';

SELECT 
    home.team_long_name AS home_team,
    away.team_long_name AS away_team,
    m.home_team_goal,
    m.away_team_goal
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Team home ON m.home_team_api_id = home.team_api_id
JOIN Team away ON m.away_team_api_id = away.team_api_id
WHERE l.name = 'Belgium Jupiler League'
    AND m.date LIKE '2008-09-24%';

SELECT 
    home.team_long_name AS home_team,
    away.team_long_name AS away_team,
    m.home_team_goal,
    m.away_team_goal
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Team home ON m.home_team_api_id = home.team_api_id
JOIN Team away ON m.away_team_api_id = away.team_api_id
WHERE l.name = 'Belgium Jupiler League'
    AND m.date LIKE '2008-09-24%';

SELECT 
    m.home_team_goal, 
    m.away_team_goal, 
    ht.team_long_name AS home_team, 
    at.team_long_name AS away_team, 
    m.date, 
    l.name AS league_name
FROM Match m
JOIN League l ON m.league_id = l.id
JOIN Team ht ON m.home_team_api_id = ht.team_api_id
JOIN Team at ON m.away_team_api_id = at.team_api_id
WHERE m.date LIKE '2008-09-24%' 
    AND l.name = 'Belgium Jupiler League'
ORDER BY m.match_api_id;

SELECT 
    l.name AS league_name,
    COUNT(m.id) AS num_games
FROM 
    Match m
JOIN 
    League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE 
    m.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY 
    l.name
ORDER BY 
    num_games DESC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT 
    l.name AS league_name,
    COUNT(m.id) AS num_games
FROM 
    Match m
JOIN 
    League l ON m.league_id = l.id
WHERE 
    m.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY 
    l.name
ORDER BY 
    num_games DESC
LIMIT 4;

SELECT 
    League.name AS league_name,
    COUNT(Match.id) AS num_games
FROM 
    Match
JOIN 
    League ON Match.league_id = League.id
WHERE 
    Match.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY 
    League.name
ORDER BY 
    num_games DESC

WITH HeaviestPlayer AS (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player
    WHERE weight = (SELECT MAX(weight) FROM Player)
),
LatestAttributes AS (
    SELECT 
        pa.player_api_id,
        pa.finishing,
        pa.curve,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pa.player_api_id ORDER BY pa.date DESC) AS rn
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    WHERE pa.player_api_id IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM HeaviestPlayer)
)
SELECT 
    finishing AS finishing_rate,
    curve AS curve_score
FROM LatestAttributes
WHERE rn = 1;

SELECT 
    p.player_name,
    pa.finishing AS finishing_rate,
    pa.curve AS curve_score
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.weight = (SELECT MAX(weight) FROM Player)
AND pa.date = (
    SELECT MAX(date)
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE player_api_id = p.player_api_id
);

WITH MaxWeightPlayers AS (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player
    WHERE weight = (SELECT MAX(weight) FROM Player)
),
LatestAttributes AS (
    SELECT player_api_id, MAX(date) AS latest_date
    FROM Player_Attributes
    WHERE player_api_id IN (SELECT player_api_id FROM MaxWeightPlayers)
    GROUP BY player_api_id
)
SELECT pa.finishing, pa.curve
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN LatestAttributes la ON pa.player_api_id = la.player_api_id AND pa.date = la.latest_date;

SELECT

WHERE 
    pa.player_api_id IN (
        SELECT 
            player_api_id 
        FROM

        WHERE 
            weight = (SELECT MAX(weight) FROM Player)
    )
    AND pa.date = (
        SELECT 
            MAX(date) 
        FROM 
            Player_Attributes pa2 
        WHERE 
            pa2.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    );

WITH MaxWeightPlayer AS (
    SELECT player_api_id, player_name, weight
    FROM Player
    WHERE weight = (SELECT MAX(weight) FROM Player)
),
LatestAttributes AS (
    SELECT 
        player_api_id,
        finishing,
        curve,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_api_id ORDER BY date DESC) AS rn

)

SELECT 
  100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.overall_rating > 70 THEN p.player_api_id END) /
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_api_id) AS percentage
FROM Player p
LEFT JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
  100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.overall_rating > 70 THEN p.player_api_id END) 
  / COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_api_id) AS percentage
FROM Player p
INNER JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

WITH latest_attrs AS (
    SELECT player_api_id, overall_rating,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_api_id ORDER BY date DESC) AS rn
    FROM Player_Attributes
),
player_data AS (
    SELECT p.player_api_id, p.height, la.overall_rating
    FROM Player p
    LEFT JOIN latest_attrs la ON p.player_api_id = la.player_api_id AND la.rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN height < 180 AND overall_rating > 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage
FROM player_data;

SELECT 
  100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.overall_rating > 70 THEN p.id END) / COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS percentage
FROM Player p

We must ensure we handle players who might not have Player_Attributes? Possibly all have attributes. But we should inner join to have both height and rating.

Alternatively, we could use a subquery to get the latest Player_Attributes for each player.

Let's design:
- Get distinct player_api_id from Player (or Player_Attributes? Actually Player table has all players). We'll use Player as base.
- For each player, get the latest Player_Attributes record (max date). We can use a correlated subquery or join with a grouped subquery.
- Then apply conditions.

But note: Player_Attributes has player_api_id and player_fifa_api_id. Player has both as well. We can join on player_api_id.

So query structure:

WITH latest_attrs AS (
    SELECT player_api_id, overall_rating
    FROM Player_Attributes pa1
    WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM Player_Attributes pa2 WHERE pa2.player_api_id = pa1.player_api_id)
)

FROM Player p
INNER JOIN latest_attrs la ON p.player_api_id = la.player_api_id;

But we need to consider that height might be NULL? Possibly not. Also, overall_rating might be NULL. The COUNT(*) will count all players that have a latest attribute record. If some players lack attributes, they won't be included. That's okay.

Alternatively, we could use a LEFT JOIN to include all players, but then overall_rating could be NULL, and condition would fail. The percentage would be out of players with attributes. That's fine.

We can also compute total players separately.

But the evidence says COUNT(id) as denominator. Which id? Probably Player.id. So we should count all players in Player table, regardless of whether they have attributes. But if they don't have attributes, we cannot determine overall_rating, so they wouldn't satisfy overall_rating > 70. So they would be counted in denominator but not numerator. That's acceptable if we treat missing rating as not >70. However, we need to join to get rating, so we need a LEFT JOIN. Then overall_rating will be NULL for players without attributes, and NULL > 70 is false. So they won't be counted in numerator. That's fine.

So let's adjust:

FROM Player p
LEFT JOIN latest_attrs la ON p.player_api_id = la.player_api_id;

This will include all players from Player table. For those without attributes, la.overall_rating is NULL, so condition fails.

We need to ensure height is in cm. The schema says height is INTEGER, likely in cm. So height < 180 is correct.

Now, we need to output the percentage. We'll multiply by 100.0 to get float.

Alternatively, we can compute numerator and denominator separately:

    100.0 * 
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id)

       AND pa.overall_rating > 70
       AND pa.date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id = p.player_api_id)

    / 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Player) AS percentage;

But this might double-count players with multiple attributes? We need distinct players. In the numerator, we use COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) to avoid duplicates if join produces multiple rows (but with latest date filter, it should be one per player). However, if a player has multiple records with same max date? Possibly not, but we can use DISTINCT.

Simpler: Use the WITH clause as above.

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(r.driverId) AS completion_rate_percentage
FROM results r
JOIN races rc ON r.raceId = rc.raceId
WHERE rc.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS completion_rate_percentage
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE ra.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / 
        COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS completion_rate_percentage
FROM results r
JOIN races rc ON r.raceId = rc.raceId
WHERE rc.date = '1983-07-16';

WITH drivers_in_race AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT r.driverId
    FROM results r
    JOIN races rc ON r.raceId = rc.raceId
    WHERE rc.date = '1983-07-16'
)
SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    COUNT(r.resultId) AS total_races,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS finished_races,
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / 
        CAST(COUNT(r.resultId) AS REAL), 
        2
    ) AS completion_rate_percent
FROM drivers_in_race dir
JOIN drivers d ON dir.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY completion_rate_percent DESC;

WITH drivers_in_race AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT r.driverId
    FROM results r
    JOIN races rc ON r.raceId = rc.raceId
    WHERE rc.date = '1983-07-16'
),
driver_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        d.driverId,
        d.forename,
        d.surname,
        COUNT(*) AS total_races,
        SUM(CASE WHEN res.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_races
    FROM drivers_in_race dir
    JOIN drivers d ON dir.driverId = d.driverId
    JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
    GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
)
SELECT 
    forename,
    surname,
    total_races,
    completed_races,
    ROUND(100.0 * completed_races / total_races, 2) AS completion_rate_percentage
FROM driver_stats
ORDER BY completion_rate_percentage DESC;

WITH driver_speeds AS (
    SELECT 
        r.raceId,
        CAST(r.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) AS speed
    FROM results r
    JOIN drivers d ON d.driverId = r.driverId
    WHERE d.forename = 'Paul' 
      AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
      AND r.raceId IN (853, 854)
)
SELECT 
    (MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 853 THEN speed END) - 
     MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 854 THEN speed END)) 
     / MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 853 THEN speed END) * 100 
     AS percent_faster
FROM driver_speeds;

WITH driver_races AS (
    SELECT 
        r.raceId,
        CAST(r.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) AS fastestLapSpeed
    FROM results r
    JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE d.forename = 'Paul' 
      AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
      AND r.raceId IN (853, 854)
)
SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 853 THEN fastestLapSpeed END) - 
      MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 854 THEN fastestLapSpeed END)) * 100.0) /
    MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 853 THEN fastestLapSpeed END) AS percent_faster
FROM driver_races;

WITH driver_races AS (
    SELECT 
        d.driverId,
        r.raceId,
        CAST(r.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) AS fastestLapSpeed
    FROM drivers d
    JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
    WHERE d.forename = 'Paul' 
      AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
      AND r.raceId IN (853, 854)
),
speeds AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 853 THEN fastestLapSpeed END) AS speed_853,
        MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 854 THEN fastestLapSpeed END) AS speed_854
    FROM driver_races
)
SELECT 
    (speed_853 - speed_854) * 100.0 / speed_853 AS percent_faster
FROM speeds
WHERE speed_853 IS NOT NULL 
  AND speed_854 IS NOT NULL;

WITH driver_races AS (
    SELECT 
        d.driverId,
        r.raceId,
        CAST(r.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) AS speed
    FROM drivers d
    JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
    WHERE d.forename = 'Paul' 
      AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
      AND r.raceId IN (853, 854)
)
SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 853 THEN speed END) AS speed_853,
    MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 854 THEN speed END) AS speed_854,
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 853 THEN speed END) - MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 854 THEN speed END)) * 100.0)
    / MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 853 THEN speed END) AS percent_faster
FROM driver_races;

    JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE d.forename = 'Paul'

)

     MAX(CASE WHEN raceId = 853 THEN speed END)) * 100 
     AS percent_faster
FROM driver_speeds;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN r.position > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_not_first
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.surname = 'Hamilton'
    AND r.year >= 2010;

WITH hamilton_races AS (
    SELECT 
        r.raceId,
        re.positionOrder,
        ra.year
    FROM results re
    JOIN drivers d ON d.driverId = re.driverId
    JOIN races ra ON ra.raceId = re.raceId
    WHERE d.surname = 'Hamilton'
      AND ra.year >= 2010
),
totals AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_races,
        SUM(CASE WHEN positionOrder > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS not_first_races
    FROM hamilton_races
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_races > 0 
        THEN (not_first_races * 100.0) / total_races 
        ELSE 0 
    END AS percentage_not_first
FROM totals;

WITH hamilton_races AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        res.positionOrder,
        res.raceId
    FROM results res
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE d.surname = 'Hamilton'
      AND r.year >= 2010
),
total_races AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM hamilton_races
),
non_first_races AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS non_first_count
    FROM hamilton_races
    WHERE positionOrder != 1
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_count = 0 THEN 0 
        ELSE ROUND((non_first_count * 100.0 / total_count), 2) 
    END AS percentage_not_first
FROM total_races, non_first_races;

WITH hamilton_races AS (
    SELECT 
        res.position,
        r.year
    FROM results res
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE d.surname = 'Hamilton' 
        AND r.year >= 2010
        AND res.position IS NOT NULL
),
totals AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_races,
        SUM(CASE WHEN position > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_first_races
    FROM hamilton_races
)
SELECT 
    total_races,
    non_first_races,
    ROUND((non_first_races * 100.0) / total_races, 2) AS percentage_non_first
FROM totals;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN res.position > 1 THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM results res
INNER JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
INNER JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.surname = 'Hamilton'
    AND r.year >= 2010;

WITH driver_wins AS (
    SELECT 
        d.driverId,
        d.forename,
        d.surname,
        d.nationality,
        COUNT(*) AS win_count
    FROM drivers d
    JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
    WHERE r.positionOrder = 1
    GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality
),
max_points_per_driver AS (
    SELECT 
        r.driverId,
        MAX(r.points) AS max_points_in_race
    FROM results r
    GROUP BY r.driverId
)
SELECT 
    dw.forename,
    dw.surname,
    dw.nationality,
    mp.max_points_in_race
FROM driver_wins dw
JOIN max_points_per_driver mp ON dw.driverId = mp.driverId
ORDER BY dw.win_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH driver_wins AS (
    SELECT driverId, COUNT(*) AS total_wins
    FROM results
    WHERE positionOrder = 1
    GROUP BY driverId
),
max_wins_driver AS (
    SELECT driverId, total_wins
    FROM driver_wins
    ORDER BY total_wins DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    d.nationality,
    MAX(r.points) AS max_point_scores
FROM drivers d
JOIN max_wins_driver mwd ON d.driverId = mwd.driverId
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality;

SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    d.nationality,
    MAX(r.points) AS max_point_scores
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE r.positionOrder = 1
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH win_counts AS (
    SELECT driverId, COUNT(*) AS wins
    FROM results
    WHERE position = 1
    GROUP BY driverId
),
max_points_per_driver AS (
    SELECT driverId, MAX(points) AS max_points
    FROM results
    GROUP BY driverId
)
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, m.max_points
FROM win_counts w
JOIN max_points_per_driver m ON w.driverId = m.driverId
JOIN drivers d ON w.driverId = d.driverId
ORDER BY w.wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH driver_wins AS (
    SELECT driverId, COUNT(*) AS win_count
    FROM results
    WHERE position = 1
    GROUP BY driverId
),
max_win_driver AS (
    SELECT driverId, win_count
    FROM driver_wins
    WHERE win_count = (SELECT MAX(win_count) FROM driver_wins)
)
SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    d.nationality,
    MAX(r.points) AS max_points_single_race
FROM max_win_driver mwd
JOIN drivers d ON mwd.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN results r ON mwd.driverId = r.driverId
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality;

SELECT 
    d.forename, 
    d.surname, 
    SUM(r.points) AS total_points
FROM 
    drivers d
    JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY 
    total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, SUM(COALESCE(r.points, 0)) AS total_points
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
GROUP BY r.driverId
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH driver_totals AS (
    SELECT driverId, SUM(points) AS total_points
    FROM results
    GROUP BY driverId
)
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, dt.total_points AS points
FROM driver_totals dt
JOIN drivers d ON dt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE dt.total_points = (SELECT MAX(total_points) FROM driver_totals)
ORDER BY dt.total_points DESC;

WITH hamilton AS (
  SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton'
),
first_race AS (
  SELECT 
    res.raceId, 
    res.points, 
    r.date, 
    r.name AS race_name, 
    r.year, 
    r.round
  FROM results res
  JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
  WHERE res.driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM hamilton)
  ORDER BY r.date ASC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  race_name, 
  year, 
  round, 
  points 
FROM first_race;

    SELECT MIN(races.date) AS first_date
    FROM races

    JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
    WHERE drivers.forename = 'Lewis' AND drivers.surname = 'Hamilton'
)

JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
WHERE 
    drivers.forename = 'Lewis' 
    AND drivers.surname = 'Hamilton'
    AND races.date = (SELECT first_date FROM first_race)
ORDER BY races.raceId
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    r.round,
    r.name AS race_name,
    c.name AS circuit_name,
    res.rank
FROM results res
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' 
  AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND res.rank = (
      SELECT MIN(rank) 
      FROM results res2 
      WHERE res2.driverId = d.driverId
        AND res2.rank IS NOT NULL
  )
ORDER BY r.year, r.round;

SELECT 
    r.name AS race_name,
    ra.year AS race_year,
    res.rank AS best_rank
FROM 
    results res
JOIN 
    races ra ON res.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN 
    drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Lewis' 
    AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
    AND res.rank IS NOT NULL
    AND res.rank = (
        SELECT MIN(rank) 
        FROM results res2 
        JOIN drivers d2 ON res2.driverId = d2.driverId
        WHERE d2.forename = 'Lewis' 
          AND d2.surname = 'Hamilton'
          AND res2.rank IS NOT NULL
    )
ORDER BY 
    ra.year, ra.round;

SELECT 
    r.year, 
    r.round, 
    r.name AS race_name, 
    c.name AS circuit_name, 
    res.rank
FROM 
    results res
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Lewis' 
    AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
    AND res.rank = (
        SELECT MIN(rank) 
        FROM results res2 
        JOIN drivers d2 ON res2.driverId = d2.driverId
        WHERE d2.forename = 'Lewis' AND d2.surname = 'Hamilton'
    )
ORDER BY 
    r.year, r.round;

SELECT 
    r.raceId,
    ra.year,
    ra.round,
    ra.name AS race_name,
    c.name AS circuit_name,
    c.location,
    c.country,
    res.rank
FROM results res
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races ra ON res.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON ra.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' 
  AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND res.rank IS NOT NULL
  AND res.rank = (
      SELECT MIN(rank) 
      FROM results res2 
      JOIN drivers d2 ON res2.driverId = d2.driverId
      WHERE d2.forename = 'Lewis' 
        AND d2.surname = 'Hamilton'
        AND res2.rank IS NOT NULL
  )
ORDER BY ra.year, ra.round;

WITH best_rank AS (
    SELECT MIN(r.rank) AS best_rank
    FROM results r
    JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' 
      AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
      AND r.rank IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    ra.name AS race_name,
    ra.year,
    ra.date,
    r.rank
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
CROSS JOIN best_rank br
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' 
  AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND r.rank = br.best_rank
ORDER BY ra.year, ra.round;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) * 100.0) / 
        COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS completion_percentage
FROM results res
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races ra ON res.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE d.nationality = 'Japanese'
  AND ra.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

    ROUND(
        COUNT(results.time) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS completion_percentage
FROM results

JOIN races ON results.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE drivers.nationality = 'Japanese'
    AND races.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.constructorId) AS japanese_constructors_zero_points_two_races
FROM constructors c
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT constructorId
    FROM constructorResults
    WHERE points = 0
    GROUP BY constructorId
    HAVING COUNT(raceId) = 2
) cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId
WHERE c.nationality = 'Japanese';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS japanese_constructors_zero_points_two_races
FROM (
    SELECT c.constructorId
    FROM constructors c
    INNER JOIN constructorResults cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId
    WHERE c.nationality = 'Japanese'
      AND cr.points = 0
    GROUP BY c.constructorId
    HAVING COUNT(cr.raceId) = 2
) AS subquery;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS japanese_constructors_zero_points_two_races
FROM constructors c
WHERE c.nationality = 'Japanese'
  AND (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM constructorResults cr
    WHERE cr.constructorId = c.constructorId
  ) = 2
  AND (
    SELECT MAX(cr2.points)
    FROM constructorResults cr2
    WHERE cr2.constructorId = c.constructorId
  ) = 0;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS japanese_constructors_zero_points_two_races
FROM (
    SELECT c.constructorId
    FROM constructors c
    JOIN constructorResults cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId
    WHERE c.nationality = 'Japanese'
    GROUP BY c.constructorId
    HAVING SUM(cr.points) = 0 AND COUNT(cr.raceId) = 2
) AS subquery;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS japanese_constructors_zero_points_two_races
FROM (
    SELECT c.constructorId
    FROM constructors c
    INNER JOIN constructorResults cr ON c.constructorId = cr.constructorId
    WHERE c.nationality = 'Japanese'
    GROUP BY c.constructorId
    HAVING COUNT(cr.raceId) = 2 AND SUM(cr.points) = 0
) AS sub;

WITH race_info AS (
    SELECT raceId 
    FROM races 
    WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
),
champion AS (
    SELECT r.milliseconds AS champ_ms
    FROM results r
    JOIN race_info ri ON r.raceId = ri.raceId
    WHERE r.positionOrder = 1
),
last_finisher AS (
    SELECT MAX(r.milliseconds) AS last_ms

)

    FROM results res

    JOIN champion_2009 c ON res.driverId = c.driverId
    WHERE r.year = 2009

      AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
)

FROM champion_results_2009
ORDER BY fastestLapMs ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.name AS circuit_name,
    c.location,
    c.country,
    c.lat,
    c.lng,
    COUNT(r.raceId) AS times_held
FROM circuits c
LEFT JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
WHERE c.country = 'Austria'
GROUP BY c.circuitId, c.name, c.location, c.country, c.lat, c.lng
ORDER BY times_held DESC;

WITH youngest_driver AS (
    SELECT driverId, forename, surname, dob
    FROM drivers
    WHERE dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
),
first_qualifying_race AS (
    SELECT 
        q.driverId,
        MIN(r.date) AS first_race_date
    FROM qualifying q
    JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE q.driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM youngest_driver)
    GROUP BY q.driverId
)
SELECT 
    r.year,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    r.date,
    r.time
FROM youngest_driver d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverId = q.driverId
JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN first_qualifying_race fqr ON d.driverId = fqr.driverId AND r.date = fqr.first_race_date
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    r.date,
    r.time
FROM drivers d
JOIN qualifying q ON d.driverId = q.driverId
JOIN races r ON q.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM drivers 
    WHERE dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
)
AND r.date = (
    SELECT MIN(r2.date)
    FROM qualifying q2
    JOIN races r2 ON q2.raceId = r2.raceId
    WHERE q2.driverId = d.driverId
)
LIMIT 1;

WITH youngest_driver AS (

        SELECT q.raceId

        WHERE q.driverId = d.driverId
    )
LIMIT 1;

SELECT

    races.date,

FROM qualifying
JOIN races ON qualifying.raceId = races.raceId
WHERE qualifying.driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM drivers 
    ORDER BY dob DESC 
    LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY races.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

WHERE d.driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM drivers 
    ORDER BY dob DESC 
    LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY r.date ASC

WITH youngest_drivers AS (
    SELECT 
        driverId,
        code,
        nationality,
        dob,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY dob DESC) AS age_rank
    FROM drivers
    WHERE dob IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    GROUP_CONCAT(code, ', ') AS top_3_youngest_driver_codes,
    SUM(CASE WHEN nationality = 'Dutch' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS netherlandic_count
FROM youngest_drivers
WHERE age_rank <= 3;

WITH youngest AS (
    SELECT code, nationality
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
SELECT 
    GROUP_CONCAT(code) AS top_3_codes,
    SUM(CASE WHEN nationality = 'Dutch' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dutch_count
FROM youngest;

WITH youngest AS (
  SELECT code, nationality
  FROM drivers
  ORDER BY dob DESC
  LIMIT 3
)
SELECT 'Code' AS type, code AS value FROM youngest
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DutchCount' AS type, CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM youngest WHERE nationality = 'Dutch') AS TEXT) AS value;

WITH youngest_drivers AS (
   SELECT code, nationality
   FROM drivers
   ORDER BY dob DESC
   LIMIT 3
)
SELECT 
   GROUP_CONCAT(code) AS top_3_youngest_driver_codes,
   COUNT(CASE WHEN nationality = 'Dutch' THEN 1 END) AS netherlandic_count
FROM youngest_drivers;

SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    AVG(ps.milliseconds) AS avg_pitstop_duration_ms
FROM drivers d
INNER JOIN pitStops ps ON d.driverId = ps.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
    AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY avg_pitstop_duration_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    d.dob,
    d.nationality,
    AVG(ps.milliseconds) AS avg_pitstop_duration_ms
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitStops ps ON d.driverId = ps.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
    AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.dob, d.nationality
ORDER BY avg_pitstop_duration_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    AVG(CAST(ps.duration AS REAL)) AS avg_pitstop_duration
FROM drivers d
INNER JOIN pitStops ps ON d.driverId = ps.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
    AND CAST(strftime('%Y', d.dob) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY avg_pitstop_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    d.dob,

FROM drivers d
INNER JOIN pitStops ps ON d.driverId = ps.driverId

    AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.dob, d.nationality
ORDER BY avg_pitstop_duration_ms ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT

FROM drivers d

SELECT 
    SUM(r.points) AS total_points,
    c.name AS constructor_name,
    c.nationality
FROM 
    results r
    JOIN races rc ON r.raceId = rc.raceId
    JOIN constructors c ON r.constructorId = c.constructorId
WHERE 
    rc.name LIKE '%Monaco Grand Prix%'
    AND rc.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY 
    r.constructorId, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY 
    total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUM(cr.points) AS total_points,
    c.name AS constructor_name,
    c.nationality
FROM constructorResults cr
JOIN races r ON cr.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorId = c.constructorId
WHERE r.name LIKE '%Monaco Grand Prix%'
  AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY cr.constructorId, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUM(r.points) AS total_points,

FROM races rc

JOIN constructors c ON r.constructorId = c.constructorId
WHERE rc.name LIKE '%Monaco Grand Prix%'
    AND rc.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY r.constructorId, c.name, c.nationality

FROM

JOIN 
    races r ON cr.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN

WITH monaco_races AS (
    SELECT raceId
    FROM races
    WHERE name LIKE '%Monaco Grand Prix%'
        AND year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
)
SELECT 
    SUM(r.points) AS total_points,
    c.name AS constructor_name,
    c.nationality
FROM results r
JOIN monaco_races mr ON r.raceId = mr.raceId
JOIN constructors c ON r.constructorId = c.constructorId
GROUP BY r.constructorId, c.name, c.nationality
ORDER BY total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH youngest_driver AS (
    SELECT 
        driverId,
        forename,
        surname,
        dob,
        nationality
    FROM drivers
    WHERE dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
),
first_race_for_driver AS (
    SELECT 
        yd.driverId,
        MIN(r.date) AS first_race_date
    FROM youngest_driver yd
    JOIN results res ON yd.driverId = res.driverId
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    GROUP BY yd.driverId
)
SELECT 
    yd.forename || ' ' || yd.surname AS full_name,
    yd.nationality,
    r.name AS first_race_name
FROM youngest_driver yd
JOIN results res ON yd.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN first_race_for_driver fr ON yd.driverId = fr.driverId AND r.date = fr.first_race_date
ORDER BY r.raceId
LIMIT 1;

WITH youngest_driver AS (
    SELECT 
        driverId,
        forename,
        surname,
        nationality,
        dob
    FROM drivers
    WHERE dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
),
first_race_for_driver AS (
    SELECT 
        yd.driverId,
        yd.forename,
        yd.surname,
        yd.nationality,
        MIN(r.date) AS first_race_date
    FROM youngest_driver yd
    JOIN results res ON yd.driverId = res.driverId
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    GROUP BY yd.driverId, yd.forename, yd.surname, yd.nationality
)
SELECT 
    fr.forename || ' ' || fr.surname AS full_name,
    fr.nationality,
    r.name AS first_race_name
FROM first_race_for_driver fr
JOIN results res ON fr.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId AND r.date = fr.first_race_date
LIMIT 1;

WITH youngest_driver AS (
    SELECT driverId, forename, surname, nationality, dob
    FROM drivers
    WHERE dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
    LIMIT 1
),
first_race AS (
    SELECT 
        r.driverId,
        MIN(ra.date) AS first_race_date
    FROM results r
    JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
    GROUP BY r.driverId
)
SELECT 
    yd.forename || ' ' || yd.surname AS full_name,
    yd.nationality,
    ra.name AS first_race_name
FROM youngest_driver yd
JOIN first_race fr ON yd.driverId = fr.driverId
JOIN results res ON yd.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races ra ON res.raceId = ra.raceId AND ra.date = fr.first_race_date
ORDER BY ra.date
LIMIT 1;

WITH youngest_driver AS (
    SELECT 
        driverId,
        forename,
        surname,
        nationality,
        dob
    FROM drivers
    WHERE dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
),
first_race_for_driver AS (
    SELECT 
        yd.driverId,
        MIN(r.date) AS first_race_date
    FROM youngest_driver yd
    JOIN results res ON yd.driverId = res.driverId
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    GROUP BY yd.driverId
)
SELECT 
    yd.forename || ' ' || yd.surname AS full_name,
    yd.nationality,
    r.name AS first_race_name
FROM youngest_driver yd
JOIN results res ON yd.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN first_race_for_driver fr ON yd.driverId = fr.driverId 
    AND r.date = fr.first_race_date
LIMIT 1;

WITH youngest_driver AS (
    SELECT driverId, forename, surname, nationality, dob
    FROM drivers
    WHERE dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
),
driver_first_race AS (
    SELECT 
        res.driverId,
        r.name AS race_name,
        r.date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY res.driverId ORDER BY r.date ASC, r.round ASC) AS rn
    FROM results res
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE res.driverId IN (SELECT driverId FROM youngest_driver)
)
SELECT 
    y.forename || ' ' || y.surname AS full_name,
    y.nationality,
    dfr.race_name AS first_race_name
FROM youngest_driver y
JOIN driver_first_race dfr ON y.driverId = dfr.driverId AND dfr.rn = 1;

SELECT MAX(accident_count) AS highest_accidents
FROM (
    SELECT r.driverId, COUNT(*) AS accident_count
    FROM results r
    JOIN races rc ON r.raceId = rc.raceId
    WHERE rc.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
      AND r.statusId = 3
    GROUP BY r.driverId
) AS driver_accidents;

SELECT MAX(accident_count) AS highest_accidents
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS accident_count
    FROM races r
    JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
    WHERE r.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
      AND res.statusId = 3
    GROUP BY res.driverId
) AS driver_accidents;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS accident_count
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
WHERE r.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
  AND res.statusId = 3
GROUP BY res.driverId
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS accident_count
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND r.statusId = 3
GROUP BY r.driverId
ORDER BY accident_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(accident_count) AS max_accidents
FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS accident_count
    FROM results r
    INNER JOIN races rc ON r.raceId = rc.raceId
    WHERE rc.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
      AND r.statusId = 3
    GROUP BY r.driverId
) AS driver_accidents;

SELECT 
    s.superhero_name,
    s.height_cm,
    p.publisher_name
FROM 
    superhero s
JOIN 
    publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE 
    p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
ORDER BY 
    s.height_cm DESC;

SELECT 
    s.superhero_name,
    s.height_cm,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY s.height_cm DESC NULLS LAST) AS height_rank
FROM 
    superhero s
    JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE 
    p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
ORDER BY 
    height_rank;

SELECT 
    s.superhero_name,
    s.height_cm,
    p.publisher_name
FROM 
    superhero s
    JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id

    s.height_cm DESC,
    s.superhero_name ASC;

SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    lt.best_time,
    lt.best_milliseconds
FROM drivers d
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        driverId,
        MIN(milliseconds) AS best_milliseconds,
        MIN(time) AS best_time
    FROM lapTimes
    WHERE milliseconds IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY driverId
) lt ON d.driverId = lt.driverId
ORDER BY lt.best_milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    MIN(l.milliseconds) AS best_lap_milliseconds
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    lapTimes l ON d.driverId = l.driverId
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY 
    best_lap_milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 20;

1014:
SELECT 
    c.name AS circuit_name,
    c.location,
    c.country,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    r.year AS race_year,
    lt.time AS fastest_lap_time,
    lt.milliseconds AS fastest_lap_milliseconds
FROM circuits c
JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
JOIN lapTimes lt ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
AND lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes lt2
    JOIN races r2 ON lt2.raceId = r2.raceId
    WHERE r2.circuitId = c.circuitId
)
ORDER BY c.name;

SELECT 
    c.name AS circuit_name,
    c.location,
    c.country,
    lt.time AS lap_time,
    lt.milliseconds,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    r.year AS race_year,
    r.name AS race_name,
    lt.lap
FROM circuits c
JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
JOIN lapTimes lt ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.circuitId ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC) = 1
ORDER BY c.name;

WITH circuit_lap_times AS (
    SELECT 
        c.circuitId,
        c.name AS circuit_name,
        c.location,
        r.year,
        d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
        res.fastestLapTime,
        -- Convert fastestLapTime to seconds for numeric comparison
        (CAST(SUBSTR(res.fastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60
         + CAST(SUBSTR(res.fastestLapTime, INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, ':') + 1) AS REAL)) AS lap_time_seconds
    FROM circuits c
    JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
    JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
        AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
        AND res.fastestLapTime != ''
),
ranked_laps AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY circuitId ORDER BY lap_time_seconds ASC) AS rn
    FROM circuit_lap_times
)
SELECT 
    circuit_name,
    location,
    fastestLapTime AS lap_record,
    driver_name,
    year
FROM ranked_laps
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY circuit_name;

WITH fastest_laps AS (
    SELECT 
        c.circuitId,
        c.name AS circuit_name,
        c.location,
        c.country,
        r.year,
        d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
        con.name AS constructor_name,
        res.fastestLapTime,
        -- Convert fastestLapTime to seconds for ordering
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.fastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 60 + 
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.fastestLapTime, INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, ':') + 1) AS REAL) AS time_seconds,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY c.circuitId 
            ORDER BY CAST(SUBSTR(res.fastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 60 + 
                     CAST(SUBSTR(res.fastestLapTime, INSTR(res.fastestLapTime, ':') + 1) AS REAL)
        ) AS rn
    FROM circuits c
    INNER JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
    INNER JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
    INNER JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    INNER JOIN constructors con ON res.constructorId = con.constructorId
    WHERE c.country = 'Italy' 
        AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    circuit_name,
    location,
    country,
    year,
    driver_name,
    constructor_name,
    fastestLapTime AS lap_record
FROM fastest_laps
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY circuit_name;

WITH fastest_times AS (
    SELECT 
        c.circuitId,
        c.name AS circuit_name,
        r.year,
        ra.name AS race_name,
        d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
        res.fastestLapTime,
        -- Convert fastestLapTime to total seconds for comparison
        CAST(substr(res.fastestLapTime, 1, instr(res.fastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS INTEGER) * 60 
        + CAST(substr(res.fastestLapTime, instr(res.fastestLapTime, ':') + 1) AS REAL) AS fastest_seconds
    FROM circuits c
    JOIN races ra ON c.circuitId = ra.circuitId
    JOIN results res ON ra.raceId = res.raceId
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE c.country = 'Italy' 
        AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
),
min_times AS (
    SELECT 
        circuitId,
        MIN(fastest_seconds) AS min_seconds
    FROM fastest_times
    GROUP BY circuitId
)
SELECT 
    ft.circuit_name,
    ft.fastestLapTime AS lap_record,
    ft.driver_name,
    ft.year,
    ft.race_name
FROM fastest_times ft
JOIN min_times mt ON ft.circuitId = mt.circuitId AND ft.fastest_seconds = mt.min_seconds
ORDER BY ft.circuit_name;

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_heroes,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bad_heroes,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS bad_percentage,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_bad_heroes
FROM 
    superhero sh
    LEFT JOIN alignment a ON sh.alignment_id = a.id
    LEFT JOIN publisher p ON sh.publisher_id = p.id;

WITH total AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM superhero
),
bad AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS bad_count
    FROM superhero
    JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
    WHERE alignment.alignment = 'Bad'
),
bad_marvel AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS bad_marvel_count
    FROM superhero
    JOIN alignment ON superhero.alignment_id = alignment.id
    JOIN publisher ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
    WHERE alignment.alignment = 'Bad'
      AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
)
SELECT 
    (bad.bad_count * 100.0 / total.total_count) AS percentage_bad,
    bad_marvel.bad_marvel_count AS bad_marvel_count
FROM total, bad, bad_marvel;

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_heroes,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 END) AS bad_heroes,
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS bad_percentage,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS marvel_bad_heroes
FROM superhero sh
LEFT JOIN alignment a ON sh.alignment_id = a.id
LEFT JOIN publisher p ON sh.publisher_id = p.id;

WITH total_superheroes AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM superhero
),
bad_superheroes AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS bad_count
    FROM superhero sh
    JOIN alignment a ON sh.alignment_id = a.id
    WHERE a.alignment = 'Bad'
),
bad_marvel_superheroes AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS bad_marvel_count
    FROM superhero sh
    JOIN alignment a ON sh.alignment_id = a.id
    JOIN publisher p ON sh.publisher_id = p.id
    WHERE a.alignment = 'Bad'
      AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (SELECT bad_count FROM bad_superheroes) * 100.0 / 
        (SELECT total_count FROM total_superheroes), 
        2
    ) AS percentage_bad,
    (SELECT bad_marvel_count FROM bad_marvel_superheroes) AS bad_marvel_count
FROM total_superheroes;

WITH counts AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_heroes,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 END) AS bad_count,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS marvel_bad_count
    FROM superhero sh
    LEFT JOIN alignment a ON sh.alignment_id = a.id
    LEFT JOIN publisher p ON sh.publisher_id = p.id
)
SELECT 
    total_heroes,
    bad_count,
    ROUND((bad_count * 100.0) / total_heroes, 2) AS bad_percentage,
    marvel_bad_count
FROM counts;

    FROM superhero s

    INNER JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
    INNER JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
    WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics'
      AND a.attribute_name = 'durability'
),
max_durability AS (

    FROM dark_horse_durability
)

WHERE d.attribute_value = m.max_val;

WITH female_heroes AS (
    SELECT 
        s.id,
        c.colour AS skin_colour
    FROM superhero s
    INNER JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
    LEFT JOIN colour c ON s.skin_colour_id = c.id
    WHERE g.gender = 'Female'
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN skin_colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_blue_female
FROM female_heroes;

WITH female_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS total_female_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.colour = 'Blue' THEN s.id END) AS blue_female_count
    FROM superhero s
    INNER JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
    LEFT JOIN colour c ON s.skin_colour_id = c.id
    WHERE g.gender = 'Female'
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_female_count > 0 
        THEN ROUND((blue_female_count * 100.0 / total_female_count), 2)
        ELSE 0 
    END AS percentage_blue_female
FROM female_counts;

WITH female_count AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM superhero sh
    JOIN gender g ON sh.gender_id = g.id
    WHERE g.gender = 'Female'
),
blue_female_count AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS blue_total
    FROM superhero sh
    JOIN gender g ON sh.gender_id = g.id
    JOIN colour c ON sh.skin_colour_id = c.id
    WHERE g.gender = 'Female' AND c.colour = 'Blue'
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN female_count.total = 0 THEN 0 
        ELSE ROUND((blue_female_count.blue_total * 100.0) / female_count.total, 2)
    END AS percentage
FROM female_count, blue_female_count;

SELECT 
    (blue_female.count * 100.0) / NULLIF(total_female.count, 0) AS percentage
FROM 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) AS count 
     FROM superhero sh 
     JOIN gender g ON sh.gender_id = g.id 
     WHERE g.gender = 'Female') AS total_female,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) AS count 
     FROM superhero sh 
     JOIN gender g ON sh.gender_id = g.id 
     JOIN colour c ON sh.skin_colour_id = c.id 
     WHERE g.gender = 'Female' AND c.colour = 'Blue') AS blue_female;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage
FROM superhero sh
JOIN gender g ON sh.gender_id = g.id
LEFT JOIN colour c ON sh.skin_colour_id = c.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / 
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 
        2
    ) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) 
    / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) 
    / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) 
    AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id;

WITH counts AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS female_count
    FROM superhero sh
    JOIN gender g ON sh.gender_id = g.id
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN female_count = 0 THEN NULL 
        ELSE male_count * 1.0 / female_count 
    END AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM counts;
829:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
    - SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
    AS difference
FROM superhero sh
JOIN publisher p ON sh.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics');

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN dc_count > marvel_count THEN 'DC Comics'
        ELSE 'Marvel Comics'
    END AS more_publisher,
    dc_count - marvel_count AS difference
FROM (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dc_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_count
    FROM superhero sh
    JOIN publisher p ON sh.publisher_id = p.id
    WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics')
) counts;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 
             SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
        THEN 'DC Comics' 
        ELSE 'Marvel Comics' 
    END AS more_publisher,
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM superhero sh
JOIN publisher p ON sh.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics');

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dc_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS difference,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN 'DC Comics'
        ELSE 'Marvel Comics'
    END AS more_publisher
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics');

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 END) > 
         COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) 
    THEN 'DC Comics' 
    ELSE 'Marvel Comics' 
  END AS more_publisher,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 END) AS dc_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS marvel_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 END) - 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 END) AS difference
FROM superhero sh
JOIN publisher p ON sh.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics');

WITH student_badges AS (
    SELECT 
        Id,
        Date,
        CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_2010,
        CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_2011
    FROM badges
    WHERE Name = 'Student'
),
counts AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        SUM(is_2010) AS count_2010,
        SUM(is_2011) AS count_2011
    FROM student_badges
)
SELECT 
    (CAST(count_2010 AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(total, 0) * 100) - 
    (CAST(count_2011 AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(total, 0) * 100) AS percentage_difference
FROM counts;

WITH student_badges AS (
  SELECT 
    Id,
    YEAR(Date) AS badge_year
  FROM badges
  WHERE Name = 'Student'
),
badge_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN badge_year = 2010 THEN 1 END) AS count_2010,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN badge_year = 2011 THEN 1 END) AS count_2011,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count
  FROM student_badges
)
SELECT 
  (CAST(count_2010 AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(total_count, 0) * 100.0) - 
  (CAST(count_2011 AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(total_count, 0) * 100.0) AS percentage_difference
FROM badge_counts;

WITH student_badges AS (
    SELECT * 
    FROM badges 
    WHERE Name = 'Student'
),
counts AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_2010,
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', Date) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_2011,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM student_badges
)
SELECT 
    (count_2010 * 100.0 / total) - (count_2011 * 100.0 / total) AS percentage_difference
FROM counts;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / 
    COUNT(*) AS percentage_difference
FROM badges
WHERE Name = 'Student';

SELECT 
    -- Calculate percentage difference: ((count_2010 - count_2011) / ((count_2010 + count_2011)/2.0)) * 100
    CASE 
        WHEN (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + 
              SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) = 0 
        THEN NULL
        ELSE 
            ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - 
              SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0) /
            ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2010 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) + 
              SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(Date) = 2011 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) / 2.0)
    END AS percentage_difference
FROM badges
WHERE Name = 'Student' 
  AND (YEAR(Date) = 2010 OR YEAR(Date) = 2011);

584:
-- Find all comments left by users who edited the post with the given title
SELECT c.*
FROM comments c
WHERE c.UserId IN (
    -- Get distinct users who edited the post
    SELECT DISTINCT ph.UserId
    FROM postHistory ph
    WHERE ph.PostId = (
        -- Find the post ID from the title
        SELECT p.Id
        FROM posts p
        WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
    )
    AND ph.UserId IS NOT NULL
)
ORDER BY c.CreationDate;

WITH target_post AS (
    SELECT Id 
    FROM posts 
    WHERE Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
),
editors AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT UserId 
    FROM postHistory 
    WHERE PostId = (SELECT Id FROM target_post) 
        AND UserId IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT c.* 
FROM comments c
WHERE c.UserId IN (SELECT UserId FROM editors);

SELECT c.*
FROM comments c
WHERE c.UserId IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ph.UserId
    FROM postHistory ph
    WHERE ph.PostId = (
        SELECT p.Id
        FROM posts p
        WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
    )
    AND ph.UserId IS NOT NULL
);

SELECT c.*
FROM comments c
WHERE c.UserId IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ph.UserId
    FROM postHistory ph
    WHERE ph.PostId = (
        SELECT p.Id
        FROM posts p
        WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
    )
    AND ph.PostHistoryTypeId IN (4, 5, 6, 7, 24)  -- edit-related types
);

WITH RECURSIVE
user_posts AS (
    SELECT p.Id, p.Tags
    FROM users u
    JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
      AND p.CommentCount = 0
),
split_tags(tag, remaining) AS (
    SELECT 
        SUBSTR(Tags, 2, INSTR(Tags, '>') - 2) AS tag,
        SUBSTR(Tags, INSTR(Tags, '>') + 1) AS remaining
    FROM user_posts
    WHERE Tags IS NOT NULL AND Tags != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        SUBSTR(remaining, 2, INSTR(remaining, '>') - 2),
        SUBSTR(remaining, INSTR(remaining, '>') + 1)
    FROM split_tags
    WHERE remaining IS NOT NULL AND remaining != '' AND INSTR(remaining, '>') > 0
)
SELECT DISTINCT tag
FROM split_tags
WHERE tag IS NOT NULL AND tag != ''
ORDER BY tag;

WITH user_mark AS (
    SELECT Id 
    FROM users 
    WHERE DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
),
posts_mark_no_comments AS (
    SELECT p.Id, p.Tags
    FROM posts p
    INNER JOIN user_mark u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
    WHERE p.CommentCount = 0 
        AND p.Tags IS NOT NULL 
        AND p.Tags != ''
),
split_tags AS (
    SELECT Id, 
           substr(Tags, 2, instr(Tags, '>') - 2) AS tag,
           substr(Tags, instr(Tags, '>') + 1) AS rest
    FROM posts_mark_no_comments
    WHERE Tags LIKE '<%>%'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT Id,
           substr(rest, 2, instr(rest, '>') - 2),
           substr(rest, instr(rest, '>') + 1)
    FROM split_tags
    WHERE rest LIKE '<%>%'
)
SELECT DISTINCT tag
FROM split_tags
WHERE tag != ''
ORDER BY tag;

WITH RECURSIVE split_tags(post_id, tag, rest) AS (
    SELECT Id,
           SUBSTR(Tags, 2, INSTR(Tags, '>') - 2),
           SUBSTR(Tags, INSTR(Tags, '>') + 1)
    FROM posts
    WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes')
      AND CommentCount = 0
      AND Tags IS NOT NULL
      AND Tags != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT post_id,
           SUBSTR(rest, 2, INSTR(rest, '>') - 2),
           SUBSTR(rest, INSTR(rest, '>') + 1)
    FROM split_tags
    WHERE rest != ''
)
SELECT DISTINCT tag
FROM split_tags
WHERE tag != ''
ORDER BY tag;

WITH user_posts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.Id,
        p.Tags
    FROM users u
    JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
        AND p.CommentCount = 0
        AND p.Tags IS NOT NULL
        AND p.Tags != ''
),
-- Recursive CTE to split tags
split_tags AS (
    SELECT 
        Id,
        -- Remove the first '<' and last '>' from Tags
        SUBSTR(Tags, 2, LENGTH(Tags) - 2) AS tag_list
    FROM user_posts
),
recursive_tags AS (
    SELECT 
        Id,
        tag_list,
        '' AS tag,
        tag_list AS remainder
    FROM split_tags
    WHERE tag_list != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        Id,
        tag_list,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(remainder, '><') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(remainder, 1, INSTR(remainder, '><') - 1)
            ELSE remainder
        END AS tag,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(remainder, '><') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(remainder, INSTR(remainder, '><') + 2)
            ELSE ''
        END AS remainder
    FROM recursive_tags
    WHERE remainder != ''
)
SELECT DISTINCT tag AS TagName
FROM recursive_tags
WHERE tag != ''
ORDER BY TagName;

WITH RECURSIVE filtered_posts AS (
    SELECT p.Id, p.Tags
    FROM users u
    INNER JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
        AND p.CommentCount = 0
        AND p.PostTypeId = 1
        AND p.Tags IS NOT NULL
        AND p.Tags != ''
),
split_tags(post_id, tag, rest) AS (
    SELECT Id,
           substr(Tags, 2, instr(substr(Tags, 2), '>') - 1) AS tag,
           substr(Tags, instr(substr(Tags, 2), '>') + 2) AS rest
    FROM filtered_posts
    UNION ALL
    SELECT post_id,
           substr(rest, 2, instr(substr(rest, 2), '>') - 1),
           substr(rest, instr(substr(rest, 2), '>') + 2)
    FROM split_tags
    WHERE rest IS NOT NULL AND rest != ''
)
SELECT DISTINCT tag
FROM split_tags
WHERE tag IS NOT NULL AND tag != ''
ORDER BY tag;

    FROM postHistory
    WHERE UserId IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY UserId, PostId
)
SELECT u.Id, u.DisplayName
FROM users u
INNER JOIN post_history_counts phc ON u.Id = phc.UserId
WHERE u.Views >= 1000
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
HAVING MAX(phc.history_count) = 1 AND MIN(phc.history_count) = 1;

FROM users u

      WHERE ph.UserId = u.Id

      SELECT 1
      FROM postHistory ph2
      WHERE ph2.UserId = u.Id
      GROUP BY ph2.UserId, ph2.PostId
      HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
  )
ORDER BY u.Id;

SELECT DISTINCT u.Id, u.DisplayName
FROM users u
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT UserId
    FROM postHistory
    WHERE UserId NOT IN (

        FROM postHistory
        GROUP BY UserId, PostId
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    )
) AS good_users ON u.Id = good_users.UserId
WHERE u.Views >= 1000;

WITH most_influential_users AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    WHERE Reputation = (SELECT MAX(Reputation) FROM users)
),
user_posts AS (
    SELECT p.Id, p.Score
    FROM posts p
    INNER JOIN most_influential_users m ON p.OwnerUserId = m.Id
),
post_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_posts,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_score_posts
    FROM user_posts
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_posts = 0 THEN 0 
        ELSE ROUND((high_score_posts * 100.0 / total_posts), 2) 
    END AS percentage_above_50
FROM post_counts;

    COUNT(r.uuid) AS ruling_count

WITH ruling_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        uuid,
        COUNT(*) AS num_rulings
    FROM rulings
    GROUP BY uuid
),
max_ruling AS (
    SELECT MAX(num_rulings) AS max_count
    FROM ruling_counts
)
SELECT 
    c.name,
    c.artist,
    c.isPromo,
    rc.num_rulings
FROM cards c
JOIN ruling_counts rc ON c.uuid = rc.uuid
JOIN max_ruling mr ON rc.num_rulings = mr.max_count
ORDER BY c.name;

WITH ruling_counts AS (
    SELECT uuid, COUNT(*) AS ruling_count
    FROM rulings
    GROUP BY uuid
),
max_ruling_count AS (
    SELECT MAX(ruling_count) AS max_count
    FROM ruling_counts
)
SELECT 
    c.name AS card_name,
    c.artist AS artist,
    CASE 
        WHEN c.isPromo = 1 THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS is_promotional_printing
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN ruling_counts rc ON c.uuid = rc.uuid
INNER JOIN max_ruling_count mc ON rc.ruling_count = mc.max_count;

WITH total_story_spotlight AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM cards
    WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1
),
french_story_spotlight AS (

    FROM cards c

    WHERE c.isStorySpotlight = 1
      AND fd.language = 'French'

SELECT

        WHEN total_count = 0 THEN 0.0
        ELSE ROUND((french_count * 100.0) / total_count, 2)
    END AS percentage_french
FROM total_story_spotlight, french_story_spotlight;

WITH total_spotlight AS (

french_spotlight AS (

      AND foreign_data.language = 'French'
)

        WHEN total_spotlight.total = 0 THEN 0

    id

WITH stats AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_story,
        SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_story_no_text
    FROM cards
    WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1
)
SELECT 
    ROUND((stats.total_story_no_text * 100.0 / NULLIF(stats.total_story, 0)), 2) AS percentage,
    cards.id
FROM stats, cards
WHERE cards.isStorySpotlight = 1 AND cards.isTextless = 1
ORDER BY cards.id;

     NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN isStorySpotlight = 1 THEN 1 END), 0)) AS percentage

WITH story_spotlight_cards AS (
    SELECT id, isTextless
    FROM cards
    WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1
),
counts AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        SUM(CASE WHEN isTextless = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS without_text
    FROM story_spotlight_cards
)
SELECT 
    (counts.without_text * 100.0 / NULLIF(counts.total, 0)) AS percentage,
    story_spotlight_cards.id
FROM story_spotlight_cards
CROSS JOIN counts
WHERE story_spotlight_cards.isTextless = 1
ORDER BY story_spotlight_cards.id;
