WITH RECURSIVE
german_cards AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.uuid, c.subtypes, c.supertypes
    FROM cards c
    JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
    WHERE f.language = 'German'
      AND c.subtypes IS NOT NULL
      AND c.supertypes IS NOT NULL
),
split_subtypes AS (
    SELECT uuid,
           substr(subtypes, 1, instr(subtypes || ',', ',') - 1) AS subtype,
           substr(subtypes, instr(subtypes || ',', ',') + 1) AS remainder
    FROM german_cards
    WHERE subtypes != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT uuid,
           substr(remainder, 1, instr(remainder || ',', ',') - 1),
           substr(remainder, instr(remainder || ',', ',') + 1)
    FROM split_subtypes
    WHERE remainder != ''
),
split_supertypes AS (
    SELECT uuid,
           substr(supertypes, 1, instr(supertypes || ',', ',') - 1) AS supertype,
           substr(supertypes, instr(supertypes || ',', ',') + 1) AS remainder
    FROM german_cards
    WHERE supertypes != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT uuid,
           substr(remainder, 1, instr(remainder || ',', ',') - 1),
           substr(remainder, instr(remainder || ',', ',') + 1)
    FROM split_supertypes
    WHERE remainder != ''
),
all_types AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT subtype AS type
    FROM split_subtypes
    WHERE subtype != ''
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT supertype AS type
    FROM split_supertypes
    WHERE supertype != ''
)
SELECT type
FROM all_types
ORDER BY type;

SELECT DISTINCT fd.type
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE fd.language = 'German'
  AND c.subtypes IS NOT NULL
  AND c.supertypes IS NOT NULL;

WITH german_cards AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.uuid, c.supertypes, c.subtypes
    FROM cards c
    INNER JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
    WHERE fd.language = 'German'
      AND c.supertypes IS NOT NULL
      AND c.subtypes IS NOT NULL
),
split_supertypes AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        json_extract(j.value, '$') AS card_type
    FROM german_cards gc,
         json_each('["' || replace(gc.supertypes, ',', '","') || '"]') j
),
split_subtypes AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT 
        json_extract(j.value, '$') AS card_type
    FROM german_cards gc,
         json_each('["' || replace(gc.subtypes, ',', '","') || '"]') j
)
SELECT card_type FROM split_supertypes
UNION
SELECT card_type FROM split_subtypes
ORDER BY card_type;

WITH german_cards AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.uuid, c.subtypes, c.supertypes
    FROM cards c
    JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
    WHERE fd.language = 'German'
      AND c.subtypes IS NOT NULL
      AND c.supertypes IS NOT NULL
),
-- Combine subtypes and supertypes into one column per row
unified_lists AS (
    SELECT uuid, subtypes AS type_list FROM german_cards
    UNION ALL
    SELECT uuid, supertypes FROM german_cards
),
-- Recursive CTE to split comma-separated lists
split_cte AS (
    SELECT uuid,
           type_list,
           '' AS single_type,
           0 AS pos
    FROM unified_lists
    WHERE type_list != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT uuid,
           substr(type_list, pos + 1),
           substr(type_list, pos + 1, 
                  CASE WHEN instr(substr(type_list, pos + 1), ',') = 0 
                       THEN length(substr(type_list, pos + 1)) 
                       ELSE instr(substr(type_list, pos + 1), ',') - 1 
                  END),
           pos + instr(substr(type_list, pos + 1), ',') + 
               CASE WHEN instr(substr(type_list, pos + 1), ',') = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 0 END
    FROM split_cte
    WHERE pos < length(type_list)
)
SELECT DISTINCT trim(single_type) AS card_type
FROM split_cte
WHERE single_type != ''
ORDER BY card_type;

WITH cards_without_power AS (
    SELECT uuid
    FROM cards
    WHERE power IS NULL OR power = '*'
),
french_versions AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT uuid
    FROM foreign_data
    WHERE language = 'French'
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT fv.uuid) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT cwp.uuid)) AS percentage
FROM cards_without_power cwp
LEFT JOIN french_versions fv ON cwp.uuid = fv.uuid;

WITH cards_without_power AS (
    SELECT uuid
    FROM cards
    WHERE power IS NULL OR power = '*'
),
total_without_power AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT uuid) AS total_count
    FROM cards_without_power
),
french_without_power AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.uuid) AS french_count
    FROM cards_without_power c
    INNER JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
    WHERE f.language = 'French'
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_count = 0 THEN 0 
        ELSE ROUND((french_count * 100.0) / total_count, 2)
    END AS percentage
FROM total_without_power, french_without_power;

SELECT 
    (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.uuid)
        FROM cards c
        INNER JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
        WHERE (c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '*') 
          AND fd.language = 'French'
    ) * 100.0 /
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM cards c
        WHERE c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '*'
    ) AS percentage;

WITH total_no_power AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT uuid) AS total
    FROM cards
    WHERE power IS NULL OR power = '*'
),
french_no_power AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.uuid) AS french_count
    FROM cards c
    JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
    WHERE f.language = 'French'
      AND (c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '*')
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total > 0 THEN (french_count * 100.0 / total)
        ELSE 0 
    END AS percentage
FROM total_no_power, french_no_power;

WITH banned_counts AS (
    SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS banned_count
    FROM legalities
    WHERE status = 'Banned'
    GROUP BY format
),
max_banned AS (
    SELECT MAX(banned_count) AS max_count
    FROM banned_counts
)
SELECT l.format, c.name AS card_name
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE l.status = 'Banned'
    AND l.format IN (
        SELECT format
        FROM banned_counts
        WHERE banned_count = (SELECT max_count FROM max_banned)
    )
ORDER BY l.format, c.name;

    GROUP BY format

    GROUP BY s.molecule_id
)
SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM oxygen_counts;

    WHERE bond_type = '-'

FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'h'
GROUP BY m.label
ORDER BY hydrogen_atom_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.label, COUNT(*) AS hydrogen_atom_count
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'h'
GROUP BY m.label
ORDER BY hydrogen_atom_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH hydrogen_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        m.label,
        COUNT(*) AS hydrogen_atom_count
    FROM atom a
    JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'h'
    GROUP BY m.label
),
max_count AS (
    SELECT MAX(hydrogen_atom_count) AS max_hydrogen_atom_count
    FROM hydrogen_counts
)
SELECT label
FROM hydrogen_counts
WHERE hydrogen_atom_count = (SELECT max_hydrogen_atom_count FROM max_count);

SELECT 
    m.label, 
    COUNT(*) AS hydrogen_atom_count
FROM 
    atom a
JOIN 
    molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE 
    a.element = 'h'
GROUP BY 
    m.label
HAVING 
    COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MAX(cnt) 
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
            FROM atom a2
            JOIN molecule m2 ON a2.molecule_id = m2.molecule_id
            WHERE a2.element = 'h'
            GROUP BY m2.label
        ) AS counts
    );

WITH hydrogen_atoms AS (
    SELECT a.molecule_id, a.atom_id
    FROM atom a
    WHERE a.element = 'h'
),
label_counts AS (
    SELECT m.label, COUNT(ha.atom_id) AS hydrogen_count
    FROM hydrogen_atoms ha
    JOIN molecule m ON ha.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
    GROUP BY m.label
),
max_count AS (
    SELECT MAX(hydrogen_count) AS max_hydrogen_count
    FROM label_counts
)
SELECT lc.label
FROM label_counts lc
JOIN max_count mc ON lc.hydrogen_count = mc.max_hydrogen_count
ORDER BY lc.label;

    c.name,
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(l.format) > 0 THEN 'Banned'
        ELSE 'Not Banned'
    END AS banned_status,
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT l.format) AS banned_formats
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid AND l.status = 'Banned'
WHERE c.artist = 'Allen Williams'
GROUP BY c.uuid, c.frameVersion, c.name
ORDER BY c.name;

    c.frameVersion AS frame_style,
    c.name AS card_name,
    l.format AS banned_in_format
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid AND l.status = 'Banned'
WHERE c.artist = 'Allen Williams'
ORDER BY c.name, l.format;

    c.name AS card_name, 
    c.frameVersion, 
    l.format AS banned_format, 
    l.status AS ban_status
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid AND l.status = 'Banned'
WHERE c.artist = 'Allen Williams'
ORDER BY c.name, l.format;

SELECT 'frame style' AS type, frameVersion AS value, NULL AS name, NULL AS artist, NULL AS format, NULL AS status
FROM cards
WHERE frameVersion IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY frameVersion
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Allen Williams card' AS type, NULL AS value, c.name, c.artist, l.format, l.status
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid AND l.status = 'Banned'
WHERE c.artist = 'Allen Williams'
ORDER BY type, value, name;

(SELECT 'Frame Style' AS type, frameVersion AS value, NULL AS details FROM cards WHERE frameVersion IS NOT NULL GROUP BY frameVersion)
UNION ALL
(SELECT 'Allen Williams Card' AS type, name AS value, frameVersion AS details FROM cards WHERE artist = 'Allen Williams')
UNION ALL
(SELECT 'Banned Card' AS type, c.name AS value, l.format AS details FROM cards c JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid WHERE l.status = 'Banned' AND c.artist = 'Allen Williams')
ORDER BY type, value;

SELECT AVG(single_bond_count) AS avg_single_bonds_per_carcinogenic_molecule
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(b.bond_id) AS single_bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id AND b.bond_type = '-'
    WHERE m.label = '+'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS molecule_bond_counts;

SELECT 
    CAST(
        (SELECT COUNT(*) 
         FROM bond b 
         JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
         WHERE m.label = '+' AND b.bond_type = '-')
        AS REAL
    ) 
    / 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM atom a 
     JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
     WHERE m.label = '+') AS average;

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM bond b 
     INNER JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
     WHERE m.label = '+' AND b.bond_type = '-') * 1.0
    /
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM atom a 
     INNER JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id 
     WHERE m.label = '+') 
    AS avg_single_bonds_per_atom;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = '-' THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) 
    AS average_single_bonds_per_carcinogenic_molecule
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = '+';

WITH bond_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        bond_type,
        COUNT(*) AS bond_count
    FROM bond
    WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010'
    GROUP BY bond_type
    ORDER BY bond_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    bc.bond_type AS majority_bond_type,
    m.label AS carcinogenicity_label,
    CASE 
        WHEN LOWER(m.label) LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM bond_counts bc
CROSS JOIN molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id = 'TR010';

SELECT 
    b.bond_type,
    COUNT(*) AS bond_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic' THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE b.molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY b.bond_type, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH bond_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        bond_type,
        COUNT(*) AS count_bonds
    FROM bond
    WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010'
    GROUP BY bond_type
),
max_bond AS (
    SELECT 
        bond_type,
        count_bonds
    FROM bond_counts
    WHERE count_bonds = (SELECT MAX(count_bonds) FROM bond_counts)
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    max_bond.bond_type,
    molecule.label AS carcinogenic_status
FROM max_bond
CROSS JOIN molecule
WHERE molecule.molecule_id = 'TR010';

SELECT 
    b.bond_type AS majority_bond_type,
    m.label,
    CASE 
        WHEN LOWER(m.label) LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE b.molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY b.bond_type, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    majority.bond_type,
    CASE 
        WHEN molecule.label = 'carcinogenic' THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM (
    SELECT bond_type, COUNT(*) AS bond_count
    FROM bond
    WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010'
    GROUP BY bond_type
    ORDER BY bond_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS majority
CROSS JOIN molecule
WHERE molecule.molecule_id = 'TR010';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT m1.molecule_id) * 100.0) /

FROM 
    molecule m1

    molecule m2

    m1.label = '+' 
    AND m2.label = '+'

        SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id

WITH carcinogenic AS (
  SELECT molecule_id
  FROM molecule
  WHERE label = '+'
),
fluorine_molecules AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id
  FROM atom
  WHERE element = 'f'
)
SELECT 
  100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN f.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) AS percentage
FROM carcinogenic c
LEFT JOIN fluorine_molecules f ON c.molecule_id = f.molecule_id;

WITH carcinogenic_molecules AS (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label = '+'
),
fluorine_molecules AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id

    WHERE element = 'f'

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT cm.molecule_id) - COUNT(DISTINCT fm.molecule_id)) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT cm.molecule_id) AS percentage
FROM carcinogenic_molecules cm

244:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id = (
    SELECT b.molecule_id
    FROM bond b
    WHERE b.bond_type = ' = '
    GROUP BY b.molecule_id
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id = (
    SELECT b.molecule_id
    FROM bond b
    WHERE b.bond_type = ' = '
    GROUP BY b.molecule_id
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) = SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
        THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM (
    SELECT 
        molecule_id, 
        double_bond_count,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY double_bond_count DESC) AS rnk
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            molecule_id, 
            COUNT(*) AS double_bond_count
        FROM bond
        WHERE bond_type = ' = '
        GROUP BY molecule_id
    ) bond_counts
) ranked
JOIN molecule m ON ranked.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE ranked.rnk = 1;

WITH double_bond_counts AS (
    SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS double_bond_count
    FROM bond
    WHERE bond_type = ' = '
    GROUP BY molecule_id
),
max_count AS (
    SELECT MAX(double_bond_count) AS max_count
    FROM double_bond_counts
),
top_molecule AS (
    SELECT d.molecule_id
    FROM double_bond_counts d
    WHERE d.double_bond_count = (SELECT max_count FROM max_count)
    ORDER BY d.molecule_id
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM top_molecule tm
JOIN molecule m ON tm.molecule_id = m.molecule_id;

WITH double_bond_counts AS (
    SELECT b.molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS double_bond_count
    FROM bond b
    WHERE b.bond_type = ' = '
    GROUP BY b.molecule_id
),
max_molecule AS (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM double_bond_counts
    ORDER BY double_bond_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM max_molecule mm
JOIN molecule m ON mm.molecule_id = m.molecule_id;

            SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0),
            0

        5
    ) AS proportion_percentage
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = '-';

SELECT AVG(bond_count) AS avg_bonds_per_iodine_atom
FROM (
    SELECT a.atom_id,
           (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM connected c WHERE c.atom_id = a.atom_id)
           +
           (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM connected c WHERE c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id)
           AS bond_count
    FROM atom a
    WHERE a.element = 'I'
) iodine_bonds;

SELECT AVG(bond_count) AS average_bonds_per_iodine_atom
FROM (
    SELECT a.atom_id, 
           (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM connected c WHERE c.atom_id = a.atom_id) +
           (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM connected c WHERE c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id) AS bond_count
    FROM atom a
    WHERE a.element = 'i'
) AS iodine_bonds;

SELECT AVG(bond_count) AS average_bonds_per_iodine_atom
FROM (
    SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(c.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM atom a
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT atom_id, bond_id FROM connected
        UNION ALL
        SELECT atom_id2 AS atom_id, bond_id FROM connected
    ) c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'I'
    GROUP BY a.atom_id
) iodine_bonds;

SELECT AVG(bond_count) AS avg_bonds_per_iodine_atom
FROM (
    SELECT 
        a.atom_id,
        COUNT(c.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM atom a
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT atom_id, bond_id FROM connected
        UNION ALL
        SELECT atom_id2 AS atom_id, bond_id FROM connected
    ) c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'i'
    GROUP BY a.atom_id
) AS iodine_bond_counts;

WITH atom_bonds AS (
    SELECT atom_id, bond_id FROM connected
    UNION ALL
    SELECT atom_id2 AS atom_id, bond_id FROM connected
),
iodine_atoms AS (
    SELECT atom_id FROM atom WHERE element = 'I'
),
bond_counts AS (
    SELECT ia.atom_id, COUNT(ab.bond_id) AS num_bonds
    FROM iodine_atoms ia
    LEFT JOIN atom_bonds ab ON ia.atom_id = ab.atom_id
    GROUP BY ia.atom_id
)
SELECT AVG(num_bonds) AS avg_bonds_per_iodine_atom
FROM bond_counts;

    (SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'h' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)) AS ratio
FROM atom a
JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.molecule_id = 'TR006'
GROUP BY a.molecule_id, m.label;

) AS highest_eligible_free_rate
FROM satscores
JOIN frpm ON satscores.cds = frpm."CDSCode"
WHERE satscores."NumTstTakr" > 0
    AND (satscores."NumGE1500" * 1.0 / satscores."NumTstTakr") > 0.3
    AND frpm."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 0;

SELECT MAX(1.0 * "Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS highest_eligible_free_rate
FROM satscores
JOIN frpm ON satscores.cds = frpm."CDSCode"
WHERE satscores."NumTstTakr" > 0 
  AND (1.0 * satscores."NumGE1500" / satscores."NumTstTakr") > 0.3
  AND frpm."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 0;

SELECT MAX(
    CAST(f."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" AS REAL) /

) AS highest_eligible_free_rate
FROM satscores s

    s.NumTstTakr > 0

    AND f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 0;

WITH LatestYear AS (
    SELECT MAX("Academic Year") AS latest_year
    FROM frpm
)
SELECT 
    s."School" AS school_name,
    s."Street" AS street,
    s."City" AS city,
    s."State" AS state,
    s."Zip" AS zip
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode"
JOIN LatestYear ly ON f."Academic Year" = ly.latest_year
WHERE 
    s."City" = 'Monterey'
    AND f."High Grade" = '12'  -- Identifies high schools
    AND f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" > 800
ORDER BY s."School";

SELECT 
    f."School Name" AS school_name,
    s.Street,
    s.City,
    s.State,
    s.Zip
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode"
WHERE 
    f."County Name" = 'Monterey'
    AND f."High Grade" = '12'
    AND f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" > 800
    AND f."Academic Year" = (SELECT MAX("Academic Year") FROM frpm)
ORDER BY 
    f."School Name";

SELECT DISTINCT 
    schools."School" AS "School Name",
    schools."Street" AS "Street",
    schools."City" AS "City",
    schools."State" AS "State",
    schools."Zip" AS "Zip"
FROM frpm
INNER JOIN schools ON frpm."CDSCode" = schools."CDSCode"
WHERE schools."City" = 'Monterey'
    AND frpm."High Grade" = '12'
    AND frpm."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" > 800;

SELECT 
    f."School Name" AS school_name,
    s."Street" AS street,
    s."City" AS city,
    s."State" AS state,
    s."Zip" AS zip
FROM frpm f
INNER JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode"
WHERE f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" > 800
    AND (f."High Grade" = '12' OR f."School Type" LIKE '%High%')
    AND s."City" = 'Monterey'
    AND s."State" = 'CA'
    AND f."Academic Year" = (SELECT MAX("Academic Year") FROM frpm)
ORDER BY f."School Name";

SELECT 
    s.School AS school_name,
    s.Street,
    s.City,
    s.State,
    s.Zip
FROM schools s
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        CDSCode,
        MAX(`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)`) AS max_frpm
    FROM frpm
    WHERE `County Name` = 'Monterey'
        AND `High Grade` = '12'
        AND `FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` > 800
    GROUP BY CDSCode
) f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
ORDER BY s.School;

WITH ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        "School Name",
        "Enrollment (K-12)",
        "Free Meal Count (K-12)",
        "Free Meal Count (K-12)" / NULLIF("Enrollment (K-12)", 0) AS eligible_free_rate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC) AS enrollment_rank
    FROM frpm
    WHERE "Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
      AND "Enrollment (K-12)" > 0
)
SELECT 
    "School Name",
    "Enrollment (K-12)",
    "Free Meal Count (K-12)",
    eligible_free_rate
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE enrollment_rank IN (10, 11);

WITH latest_year AS (
    SELECT MAX("Academic Year") AS max_year FROM frpm
),
ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        f."CDSCode",
        f."School Name",
        f."Enrollment (K-12)",
        f."Free Meal Count (K-12)",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY f."Enrollment (K-12)" DESC
        ) AS enrollment_rank,
        CASE 
            WHEN f."Enrollment (K-12)" > 0 
            THEN f."Free Meal Count (K-12)" * 1.0 / f."Enrollment (K-12)"
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS eligible_free_rate
    FROM frpm f
    INNER JOIN latest_year ly ON f."Academic Year" = ly.max_year
    WHERE f."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    "School Name",
    eligible_free_rate
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE enrollment_rank IN (10, 11)
ORDER BY enrollment_rank;

WITH latest_frpm AS (
    SELECT 
        CDSCode,
        MAX("Academic Year") AS latest_year
    FROM frpm
    GROUP BY CDSCode
),
school_enrollment AS (
    SELECT 
        f.CDSCode,
        f."Enrollment (K-12)" AS enrollment,
        f."Free Meal Count (K-12)" AS free_meal_count
    FROM frpm f
    INNER JOIN latest_frpm lf 
        ON f.CDSCode = lf.CDSCode 
        AND f."Academic Year" = lf.latest_year
    WHERE f."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL 
        AND f."Enrollment (K-12)" > 0
),
ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        CDSCode,
        enrollment,
        free_meal_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY enrollment DESC) AS rank
    FROM school_enrollment
)
SELECT 
    rank,
    CDSCode,
    enrollment,
    free_meal_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN enrollment > 0 
        THEN ROUND(free_meal_count * 100.0 / enrollment, 2) 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS eligible_free_rate_percent
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE rank IN (10, 11)
ORDER BY rank;

WITH latest_frpm AS (
    SELECT 
        CDSCode,
        MAX("Academic Year") AS latest_year
    FROM frpm
    GROUP BY CDSCode
),
school_data AS (
    SELECT 
        f."School Name",
        f."Enrollment (K-12)",
        f."Free Meal Count (K-12)",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY f."Enrollment (K-12)" DESC) AS enrollment_rank
    FROM frpm f
    INNER JOIN latest_frpm lf 
        ON f.CDSCode = lf.CDSCode 
        AND f."Academic Year" = lf.latest_year
    WHERE f."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    "School Name",
    "Enrollment (K-12)",
    "Free Meal Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)" AS eligible_free_rate
FROM school_data
WHERE enrollment_rank IN (10, 11)
ORDER BY enrollment_rank;

WITH ranked_schools AS (
  SELECT 
    CDSCode,
    `School Name`,
    `Enrollment (K-12)`,
    `Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)`,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY `Enrollment (K-12)` DESC) AS rank
  FROM frpm
  WHERE `Academic Year` = (SELECT MAX(`Academic Year`) FROM frpm)
    AND `School Code` IS NOT NULL
    AND `School Code` != ''  -- ensure it's a school record
)
SELECT 
  `School Name`,
  `Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)` AS eligible_free_rate,
  `Enrollment (K-12)`
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE rank IN (10, 11)
ORDER BY rank;

28:
WITH LatestFRPM AS (
    SELECT 
        CDSCode,
        MAX("Academic Year") AS LatestYear
    FROM frpm
    GROUP BY CDSCode
),
LocallyFundedSchools AS (
    SELECT 
        f.CDSCode,
        f."Academic Year",
        f."Enrollment (K-12)" AS EnrollK12,
        f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS Enroll5_17,
        s.School,
        s.DOCType,
        s.FundingType
    FROM frpm f
    INNER JOIN LatestFRPM lf ON f.CDSCode = lf.CDSCode AND f."Academic Year" = lf.LatestYear
    INNER JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
    WHERE s.FundingType = 'Locally funded'
),
Differences AS (
    SELECT 
        CDSCode,
        School,
        DOCType,
        (EnrollK12 - Enroll5_17) AS EnrollmentDiff
    FROM LocallyFundedSchools
    WHERE EnrollK12 IS NOT NULL AND Enroll5_17 IS NOT NULL
),
AvgDiff AS (
    SELECT AVG(EnrollmentDiff) AS AvgEnrollmentDiff
    FROM Differences
)
SELECT 
    d.School AS "School Name",
    d.DOCType AS "DOC Type"
FROM Differences d
CROSS JOIN AvgDiff a
WHERE d.EnrollmentDiff > a.AvgEnrollmentDiff
ORDER BY d.School;

WITH locally_funded_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        s.CDSCode,
        s.School,
        s.DOCType,
        f."Enrollment (K-12)",
        f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)",
        (f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS enrollment_diff
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
    WHERE s.FundingType = 'Locally funded'
        AND f."Academic Year" = (SELECT MAX("Academic Year") FROM frpm)
        AND f."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
        AND f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL
),
avg_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG(enrollment_diff) AS avg_enrollment_diff
    FROM locally_funded_schools
)
SELECT 
    School,
    DOCType
FROM locally_funded_schools, avg_diff
WHERE enrollment_diff > avg_enrollment_diff;

WITH school_diff AS (
    SELECT 
        f.CDSCode,
        f.`Academic Year`,
        f.`Enrollment (K-12)` - f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` AS enrollment_diff,
        s.School,
        s.DOCType,
        s.FundingType
    FROM frpm f
    INNER JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
    WHERE s.FundingType = 'Locally funded'
        AND f.`Enrollment (K-12)` IS NOT NULL 
        AND f.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` IS NOT NULL
),
latest_year AS (
    SELECT 
        CDSCode,
        MAX(`Academic Year`) AS max_year
    FROM school_diff
    GROUP BY CDSCode
),
latest_diff AS (
    SELECT sd.*
    FROM school_diff sd
    INNER JOIN latest_year ly 
        ON sd.CDSCode = ly.CDSCode 
        AND sd.`Academic Year` = ly.max_year
),
avg_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG(enrollment_diff) AS avg_enrollment_diff
    FROM latest_diff
)
SELECT 
    School,
    DOCType
FROM latest_diff
WHERE enrollment_diff > (SELECT avg_enrollment_diff FROM avg_diff)
ORDER BY School;

WITH latest_frpm AS (
    SELECT f.*
    FROM frpm f
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT "CDSCode", MAX("Academic Year") AS max_year
        FROM frpm
        GROUP BY "CDSCode"
    ) latest ON f."CDSCode" = latest."CDSCode" AND f."Academic Year" = latest.max_year
),
locally_funded AS (
    SELECT 
        s."CDSCode",
        s."School",
        s."DOCType",
        f."Enrollment (K-12)",
        f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)",
        (f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS enrollment_diff
    FROM latest_frpm f
    JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode"
    WHERE s."FundingType" = 'Locally funded'
),
avg_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG(enrollment_diff) AS avg_enrollment_diff
    FROM locally_funded
)
SELECT 
    "School",
    "DOCType"
FROM locally_funded, avg_diff
WHERE locally_funded.enrollment_diff > avg_diff.avg_enrollment_diff;

WITH locally_funded_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        f."School Name",
        s."DOCType",
        (f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS enrollment_diff
    FROM frpm f
    INNER JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode"
    WHERE s."FundingType" = 'Locally Funded'
),
avg_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG(enrollment_diff) AS avg_enrollment_diff
    FROM locally_funded_schools
)
SELECT 
    lfs."School Name",
    lfs."DOCType"
FROM locally_funded_schools lfs, avg_diff ad
WHERE lfs.enrollment_diff > ad.avg_enrollment_diff;
32:
WITH latest_frpm AS (
    SELECT 
        CDSCode,
        MAX("Academic Year") AS max_year
    FROM frpm
    GROUP BY CDSCode
),
frpm_latest AS (
    SELECT 
        f.*
    FROM frpm f
    INNER JOIN latest_frpm lf 
        ON f.CDSCode = lf.CDSCode 
        AND f."Academic Year" = lf.max_year
)
SELECT 
    s."School" AS school_name,
    f."FRPM Count (K-12)" * 1.0 / NULLIF(f."Enrollment (K-12)", 0) AS eligible_frpm_rate
FROM frpm_latest f
INNER JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.SOC = '66'
ORDER BY f."FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH latest_year AS (
    SELECT MAX("Academic Year") AS max_year
    FROM frpm
)
SELECT 
    f."CDSCode",
    f."School Name",
    f."FRPM Count (K-12)",
    f."Enrollment (K-12)",
    CASE 
        WHEN f."Enrollment (K-12)" > 0 
        THEN f."FRPM Count (K-12)" * 1.0 / f."Enrollment (K-12)"
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS eligible_frpm_rate
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode"
WHERE s."SOC" = '66'
    AND f."Academic Year" = (SELECT max_year FROM latest_year)
    AND f."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
    AND f."FRPM Count (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY f."FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH latest_year AS (
    SELECT MAX("Academic Year") AS max_year
    FROM frpm
)
SELECT 
    s."School" AS school_name,
    f."FRPM Count (K-12)" AS frpm_count,
    f."Enrollment (K-12)" AS enrollment,
    (f."FRPM Count (K-12)" * 1.0 / f."Enrollment (K-12)") AS eligible_frpm_rate
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode"
CROSS JOIN latest_year
WHERE f."Academic Year" = latest_year.max_year
    AND s."SOC" = '66'
    AND f."Enrollment (K-12)" > 0  -- avoid division by zero
ORDER BY f."FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH latest_year AS (
    SELECT MAX("Academic Year") AS max_year
    FROM frpm
)
SELECT 
    f."School Name",
    f."Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)" AS eligible_frpm_rate
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode"
WHERE f."Academic Year" = (SELECT max_year FROM latest_year)
    AND s."SOC" = '66'
ORDER BY f."FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH latest_year AS (
    SELECT MAX("Academic Year") AS max_year
    FROM frpm
)
SELECT 
    f."School Name",
    f."FRPM Count (K-12)" / NULLIF(f."Enrollment (K-12)", 0) AS eligible_frpm_rate
FROM frpm f
INNER JOIN schools s ON f."CDSCode" = s."CDSCode"
CROSS JOIN latest_year ly
WHERE s."SOC" = '66'
    AND f."Academic Year" = ly.max_year
    AND f."Enrollment (K-12)" > 0
ORDER BY f."FRPM Count (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH excellence_rates AS (

           CAST(NumGE1500 AS REAL) / NULLIF(NumTstTakr, 0) AS excellence_rate
    FROM satscores

)
SELECT s.Street, s.City, s.Zip, s.State

SELECT

WHERE s.AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL AND s.AdmLName2 IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL

SELECT

UNION ALL
SELECT

FROM schools s

WHERE s.AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL AND s.AdmLName2 IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
    TRIM(s.AdmFName3 || ' ' || s.AdmLName3) AS full_name

WITH max_sat AS (
    SELECT MAX(NumGE1500) AS max_num
    FROM satscores

top_schools AS (

    FROM satscores
    JOIN max_sat ON satscores.NumGE1500 = max_sat.max_num
)
SELECT 
    TRIM(s.AdmFName1 || ' ' || s.AdmLName1) AS full_name
FROM top_schools ts
JOIN schools s ON ts.cds = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL AND s.AdmLName1 IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    TRIM(s.AdmFName2 || ' ' || s.AdmLName2) AS full_name
FROM top_schools ts
JOIN schools s ON ts.cds = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL AND s.AdmLName2 IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    TRIM(s.AdmFName3 || ' ' || s.AdmLName3) AS full_name
FROM top_schools ts
JOIN schools s ON ts.cds = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL AND s.AdmLName3 IS NOT NULL;

WITH max_school AS (
    SELECT cds
    FROM satscores
    WHERE NumGE1500 = (SELECT MAX(NumGE1500) FROM satscores)
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(s.AdmFName1 || ' ' || s.AdmLName1) AS full_name

JOIN schools s ON m.cds = s.CDSCode

SELECT DISTINCT

WHERE s.AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL AND s.AdmLName2 IS NOT NULL
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT
    TRIM(s.AdmFName3 || ' ' || s.AdmLName3) AS full_name
FROM max_school m
JOIN schools s ON m.cds = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL AND s.AdmLName3 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY full_name;

WITH ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        s.School AS school_name,
        s.County AS county,
        sc.AvgScrRead AS avg_reading_score,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY s.County 
            ORDER BY sc.AvgScrRead DESC
        ) AS rank_in_county
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds
    WHERE s.Virtual = 'F' 
        AND sc.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    school_name,
    county,
    avg_reading_score,
    rank_in_county
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE rank_in_county <= 5
ORDER BY county, rank_in_county;

WITH VirtualSchools AS (
    SELECT 
        s.CDSCode,
        s.School AS SchoolName,
        s.County,
        sat.AvgScrRead
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN satscores sat ON s.CDSCode = sat.cds
    WHERE s.Virtual = 'F'
      AND sat.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL
),
RankedSchools AS (
    SELECT 
        *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY County ORDER BY AvgScrRead DESC) AS rank_in_county
    FROM VirtualSchools
)
SELECT 
    SchoolName,
    County,
    AvgScrRead,
    rank_in_county
FROM RankedSchools
WHERE rank_in_county <= 5
ORDER BY County, rank_in_county;

WITH ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        s.School,
        s.County,
        sc.AvgScrRead,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY sc.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rank_in_county
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds
    WHERE s.Virtual = 'F'
        AND sc.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT School
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE rank_in_county <= 5
ORDER BY County, rank_in_county;

WITH ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        s.School AS school_name,
        s.County,
        sat.AvgScrRead,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY sat.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rank_in_county
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN satscores sat ON s.CDSCode = sat.cds
    WHERE s.Virtual = 'F' 
        AND sat.rtype = 'S' 
        AND sat.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    school_name,
    County,
    AvgScrRead,
    rank_in_county
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE rank_in_county <= 5
ORDER BY County, rank_in_county;

SELECT 
    s.School AS school_name,
    s.County AS county,
    sat.AvgScrRead AS avg_reading_score,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY sat.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rank_in_county
FROM schools s
INNER JOIN satscores sat ON s.CDSCode = sat.cds AND sat.rtype = 'S'
WHERE s.Virtual = 'F'
    AND sat.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY sat.AvgScrRead DESC) <= 5
ORDER BY s.County, rank_in_county;

WITH merged_schools AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT s.CDSCode, s.DOC
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
    INNER JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds
    WHERE s.County = 'Orange'
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN DOC = '54' THEN 1 END) AS unified_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN DOC = '52' THEN 1 END) AS elementary_count,
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN DOC = '54' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / 
        NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN DOC = '52' THEN 1 END), 0) AS ratio
FROM merged_schools;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN s.DOC = '54' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / 
        NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN s.DOC = '52' THEN 1 END), 0), 
        2
    ) AS ratio_unified_to_elementary
FROM schools s
WHERE s.StatusType = 'Merged' 
  AND s.County = 'Orange County';

WITH merged_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        s.DOC,
        COUNT(DISTINCT s.CDSCode) AS school_count
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds
    WHERE s.County = 'Orange'
      AND sc.rtype = 'M'
      AND s.DOC IN ('52', '54')
    GROUP BY s.DOC
),
unified_count AS (
    SELECT school_count 
    FROM merged_counts 
    WHERE DOC = '54'
),
elementary_count AS (
    SELECT school_count 
    FROM merged_counts 
    WHERE DOC = '52'
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT school_count FROM unified_count)::FLOAT / 
    NULLIF((SELECT school_count FROM elementary_count), 0) AS ratio

WITH unified_schools AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.CDSCode) AS count_unified
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
    INNER JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds
    WHERE s.County = 'Orange'
      AND s.DOC = '54'
),
elementary_schools AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.CDSCode) AS count_elementary
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
    INNER JOIN satscores sc ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds
    WHERE s.County = 'Orange'
      AND s.DOC = '52'
)
SELECT 
    count_unified,
    count_elementary,
    CASE 
        WHEN count_elementary > 0 
        THEN CAST(count_unified AS REAL) / count_elementary 
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS ratio_unified_to_elementary
FROM unified_schools, elementary_schools;

WITH unified_schools AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s."CDSCode") AS cnt
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN frpm f ON s."CDSCode" = f."CDSCode"
    INNER JOIN satscores sc ON s."CDSCode" = sc.cds
    WHERE s."County" = 'Orange' AND s."DOC" = '54'
),
elementary_schools AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s."CDSCode") AS cnt
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN frpm f ON s."CDSCode" = f."CDSCode"
    INNER JOIN satscores sc ON s."CDSCode" = sc.cds
    WHERE s."County" = 'Orange' AND s."DOC" = '52'
)
SELECT 
    unified_schools.cnt::FLOAT / NULLIF(elementary_schools.cnt, 0) AS ratio
FROM unified_schools, elementary_schools;

SELECT 
    s."School" AS school_name,
    s."District" AS district_name,
    MAX(f."Enrollment (K-12)") AS max_k12_enrollment
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s."CDSCode" = f."CDSCode"
WHERE s."DOC" = '31'
GROUP BY s."CDSCode", s."School", s."District"
ORDER BY max_k12_enrollment DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    s.CDSCode,
    s.School,
    s.District,
    s.County,
    f."Enrollment (K-12)" AS enrollment_k12
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.DOC = '31'
    AND f."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
    AND f."Enrollment (K-12)" = (
        SELECT MAX(f2."Enrollment (K-12)")
        FROM schools s2
        JOIN frpm f2 ON s2.CDSCode = f2.CDSCode
        WHERE s2.DOC = '31'
    )
ORDER BY enrollment_k12 DESC;

WITH latest_year AS (
    SELECT MAX("Academic Year") AS latest_academic_year
    FROM frpm
),
state_special_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        s."School" AS school_name,
        s."CDSCode",
        f."Enrollment (K-12)" AS enrollment_k12
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN frpm f ON s."CDSCode" = f."CDSCode"
    INNER JOIN latest_year ly ON f."Academic Year" = ly.latest_academic_year
    WHERE s."DOC" = '31'
)
SELECT 
    school_name,
    enrollment_k12
FROM state_special_schools
WHERE enrollment_k12 = (SELECT MAX(enrollment_k12) FROM state_special_schools)
ORDER BY school_name;

WITH LatestYear AS (
    SELECT MAX("Academic Year") AS latest_year
    FROM frpm
),
StateSpecialSchools AS (
    SELECT 
        s."CDSCode",
        s."School",
        s."District",
        s."County",
        f."Enrollment (K-12)" AS enrollment_k12
    FROM schools s
    INNER JOIN frpm f ON s."CDSCode" = f."CDSCode"
    INNER JOIN LatestYear ly ON f."Academic Year" = ly.latest_year
    WHERE s."DOC" = '31'
)
SELECT 
    "CDSCode",
    "School",
    "District",
    "County",
    enrollment_k12
FROM StateSpecialSchools
WHERE enrollment_k12 = (SELECT MAX(enrollment_k12) FROM StateSpecialSchools)
ORDER BY enrollment_k12 DESC;

WITH latest_frpm AS (
    SELECT 
        CDSCode,
        "Academic Year",
        "Enrollment (K-12)",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CDSCode ORDER BY "Academic Year" DESC) AS rn
    FROM frpm
    WHERE "Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    s."School" AS school_name,
    l."Enrollment (K-12)" AS enrollment_k12
FROM latest_frpm l
JOIN schools s ON l.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.DOC = '31' 
  AND l.rn = 1
ORDER BY l."Enrollment (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    CDSCode,
    School,
    NULLIF(AdmEmail1, '') AS AdminEmail1,
    NULLIF(AdmEmail2, '') AS AdminEmail2,
    NULLIF(AdmEmail3, '') AS AdminEmail3
FROM schools
WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'
    AND District = 'San Bernardino City Unified'
    AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
    AND SOC = '62'
    AND DOC = '54'
    AND (
        NULLIF(AdmEmail1, '') IS NOT NULL
        OR NULLIF(AdmEmail2, '') IS NOT NULL
        OR NULLIF(AdmEmail3, '') IS NOT NULL
    );

WITH filtered_schools AS (
    SELECT AdmEmail1, AdmEmail2, AdmEmail3
    FROM schools
    WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'
        AND District = 'San Bernardino City Unified'
        AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
        AND SOC = '62'
        AND DOC = '54'
)
SELECT DISTINCT email AS valid_email_address
FROM (
    SELECT AdmEmail1 AS email FROM filtered_schools WHERE AdmEmail1 IS NOT NULL AND AdmEmail1 != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmEmail2 AS email FROM filtered_schools WHERE AdmEmail2 IS NOT NULL AND AdmEmail2 != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmEmail3 AS email FROM filtered_schools WHERE AdmEmail3 IS NOT NULL AND AdmEmail3 != ''
) AS emails
WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND email != '';

        AND SOC = '62'
        AND DOC = '54'
        AND Charter = 0
        AND AdmEmail2 IS NOT NULL AND AdmEmail2 != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT TRIM(AdmEmail3) FROM schools
    WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'
        AND District = 'San Bernardino City Unified'
        AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
        AND SOC = '62'
        AND DOC = '54'
        AND Charter = 0
        AND AdmEmail3 IS NOT NULL AND AdmEmail3 != ''
) AS emails
WHERE email != '';

WITH filtered_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        AdmEmail1,
        AdmEmail2,
        AdmEmail3
    FROM schools
    WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'
      AND District = 'San Bernardino City Unified'
      AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
      AND SOC = '62'
      AND DOC = '54'
      AND Charter = 0
)
SELECT DISTINCT email
FROM (
    SELECT AdmEmail1 AS email FROM filtered_schools WHERE AdmEmail1 IS NOT NULL AND AdmEmail1 != ''
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmEmail2 FROM filtered_schools WHERE AdmEmail2 IS NOT NULL AND AdmEmail2 != ''
    UNION ALL

SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(email) AS administrator_email
FROM (
    SELECT AdmEmail1 AS email
    FROM schools
    WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'

        AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
        AND SOC = '62'
        AND DOC = '54'
        AND Charter = 0
        AND AdmEmail1 IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(AdmEmail1) != ''
    UNION
    SELECT AdmEmail2 AS email
    FROM schools
    WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'
        AND District = 'San Bernardino City Unified'
        AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
        AND SOC = '62'
        AND DOC = '54'
        AND Charter = 0
        AND AdmEmail2 IS NOT NULL
        AND TRIM(AdmEmail2) != ''
    UNION
    SELECT AdmEmail3 AS email

    WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'
        AND District = 'San Bernardino City Unified'
        AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'

WITH eligible_loans AS (
    SELECT 
        l.account_id,
        l.amount AS loan_amount,
        a.date AS account_open_date
    FROM loan l
    INNER JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE l.duration > 12 
      AND strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
)
SELECT 
    account_id,
    loan_amount,
    account_open_date
FROM eligible_loans
WHERE loan_amount = (SELECT MAX(loan_amount) FROM eligible_loans);

WITH filtered_loans AS (
    SELECT 
        a.account_id,
        a.district_id,
        a.frequency,
        a.date AS account_date,
        l.loan_id,
        l.amount AS loan_amount,
        l.duration,
        l.payments,
        l.status
    FROM account a
    INNER JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
    WHERE l.duration > 12
      AND strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
),
max_amount AS (
    SELECT MAX(loan_amount) AS max_loan_amount
    FROM filtered_loans
)
SELECT 
    fl.account_id,
    fl.district_id,
    fl.frequency,
    fl.account_date,
    fl.loan_amount,
    fl.duration,
    fl.payments,
    fl.status
FROM filtered_loans fl
CROSS JOIN max_amount ma
WHERE fl.loan_amount = ma.max_loan_amount;

WITH filtered_loans AS (
    SELECT 
        l.account_id,
        l.amount AS loan_amount,
        a.date AS account_open_date
    FROM loan l
    INNER JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE l.duration > 12 
      AND strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
)
SELECT 
    account_id,
    loan_amount,
    account_open_date
FROM filtered_loans
WHERE loan_amount = (SELECT MAX(loan_amount) FROM filtered_loans);

WITH eligible_loans AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id, 
        amount AS loan_amount
    FROM loan
    WHERE duration > 12
),
max_loan AS (
    SELECT MAX(loan_amount) AS max_amount
    FROM eligible_loans
)
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM account a
INNER JOIN eligible_loans el ON a.account_id = el.account_id
INNER JOIN max_loan ml ON el.loan_amount = ml.max_amount
WHERE strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993';

SELECT 
    a.account_id,
    a.date AS account_open_date,
    l.loan_id,
    l.amount AS loan_amount,
    l.duration
FROM account a
INNER JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE l.duration > 12
    AND strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
    AND l.amount = (
        SELECT MAX(l2.amount)
        FROM loan l2
        INNER JOIN account a2 ON l2.account_id = a2.account_id
        WHERE l2.duration > 12
            AND strftime('%Y', a2.date) = '1993'
    );

WITH youngest_clients AS (
    SELECT 
        c.client_id, 
        c.birth_date, 
        c.district_id,
        d.A11
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.birth_date = (SELECT MAX(birth_date) FROM client)
),
max_salary_among_youngest AS (
    SELECT MAX(A11) AS max_A11
    FROM youngest_clients
)
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM youngest_clients yc
JOIN disp dp ON yc.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE yc.A11 = (SELECT max_A11 FROM max_salary_among_youngest);

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.birth_date = (SELECT MAX(birth_date) FROM client)
  AND d.A11 = (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district);

WITH youngest_birth AS (
    SELECT MAX(birth_date) AS max_birth_date
    FROM client
),
highest_salary AS (
    SELECT MAX(A11) AS max_avg_salary
    FROM district
)
SELECT DISTINCT d.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN district di ON c.district_id = di.district_id
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
CROSS JOIN youngest_birth yb
CROSS JOIN highest_salary hs
WHERE c.birth_date = yb.max_birth_date
  AND di.A11 = hs.max_avg_salary;

WITH highest_salary_district AS (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A11 = (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district)
),
youngest_clients AS (
    SELECT client_id, birth_date
    FROM client
    WHERE district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM highest_salary_district)
      AND birth_date = (
          SELECT MAX(birth_date)
          FROM client
          WHERE district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM highest_salary_district)
      )
)
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN youngest_clients y ON d.client_id = y.client_id
WHERE d.type = 'OWNER';

WITH max_birth AS (
    SELECT MAX(birth_date) AS max_bd
    FROM client
),
max_salary AS (
    SELECT MAX(A11) AS max_a11
    FROM district
)
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id AND dp.type = 'OWNER'
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
CROSS JOIN max_birth
CROSS JOIN max_salary
WHERE c.birth_date = max_birth.max_bd
  AND d.A11 = max_salary.max_a11;

WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT 
        c.client_id,
        c.birth_date,
        d.disp_id,
        d.account_id,
        d.type AS disp_type,
        a.district_id AS acc_district_id,
        dist.A11 AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN district dist ON a.district_id = dist.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F' 
      AND d.type = 'OWNER'
),
oldest_birth_date AS (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS oldest_date
    FROM female_clients
),
oldest_female AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id,
        avg_salary
    FROM female_clients
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT oldest_date FROM oldest_birth_date)
),
min_salary_among_oldest AS (
    SELECT MIN(avg_salary) AS lowest_avg_salary
    FROM oldest_female
),
max_overall_salary AS (
    SELECT MAX(A11) AS highest_avg_salary
    FROM district
)
SELECT 
    of.account_id,
    (mos.highest_avg_salary - msao.lowest_avg_salary) AS salary_gap
FROM oldest_female of
CROSS JOIN min_salary_among_oldest msao
CROSS JOIN max_overall_salary mos
WHERE of.avg_salary = msao.lowest_avg_salary;

WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT client_id, birth_date, district_id
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
),
oldest_birth_date AS (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS oldest_date
    FROM female_clients
),
oldest_female AS (
    SELECT fc.client_id, fc.birth_date, fc.district_id
    FROM female_clients fc
    INNER JOIN oldest_birth_date obd ON fc.birth_date = obd.oldest_date
),
oldest_female_with_salary AS (
    SELECT ofc.client_id, ofc.birth_date, ofc.district_id, d.A11 AS avg_salary
    FROM oldest_female ofc
    INNER JOIN district d ON ofc.district_id = d.district_id
),
min_salary_among_oldest AS (
    SELECT MIN(avg_salary) AS min_avg_salary
    FROM oldest_female_with_salary
),
oldest_female_lowest_salary AS (
    SELECT ofs.client_id, ofs.birth_date, ofs.district_id, ofs.avg_salary
    FROM oldest_female_with_salary ofs
    INNER JOIN min_salary_among_oldest ms ON ofs.avg_salary = ms.min_avg_salary
),
max_salary_overall AS (
    SELECT MAX(A11) AS max_avg_salary
    FROM district
),
gap_calc AS (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT max_avg_salary FROM max_salary_overall) AS max_salary,
        (SELECT min_avg_salary FROM min_salary_among_oldest) AS min_salary,
        (SELECT max_avg_salary FROM max_salary_overall) - 
        (SELECT min_avg_salary FROM min_salary_among_oldest) AS salary_gap
)
SELECT DISTINCT 
    a.account_id,
    gc.salary_gap
FROM oldest_female_lowest_salary ofls
INNER JOIN disp dp ON ofls.client_id = dp.client_id
INNER JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
CROSS JOIN gap_calc gc;

WITH oldest_female AS (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS oldest_birth_date
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
),
oldest_female_clients AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id, d.A11 AS avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F' 
      AND c.birth_date = (SELECT oldest_birth_date FROM oldest_female)
),
min_salary_among_oldest AS (
    SELECT MIN(avg_salary) AS lowest_avg_salary
    FROM oldest_female_clients
),
max_overall_salary AS (
    SELECT MAX(A11) AS highest_avg_salary
    FROM district
),
target_clients AS (
    SELECT ofc.client_id, ofc.avg_salary
    FROM oldest_female_clients ofc
    WHERE ofc.avg_salary = (SELECT lowest_avg_salary FROM min_salary_among_oldest)
)
SELECT 
    a.account_id,
    (SELECT lowest_avg_salary FROM min_salary_among_oldest) AS lowest_avg_salary,
    (SELECT highest_avg_salary FROM max_overall_salary) AS highest_avg_salary,
    (SELECT highest_avg_salary FROM max_overall_salary) - 
    (SELECT lowest_avg_salary FROM min_salary_among_oldest) AS salary_gap
FROM target_clients tc
JOIN disp dp ON tc.client_id = dp.client_id AND dp.type = 'OWNER'
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id;

WITH oldest_female AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.birth_date, d.A11
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
      AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
),
lowest_salary_among_oldest AS (
    SELECT MIN(A11) AS lowest_avg_salary FROM oldest_female
),
highest_salary_overall AS (
    SELECT MAX(A11) AS highest_avg_salary FROM district
)
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id,
       (SELECT highest_avg_salary FROM highest_salary_overall) -
       (SELECT lowest_avg_salary FROM lowest_salary_among_oldest) AS salary_gap
FROM oldest_female ofem
JOIN disp dp ON ofem.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE ofem.A11 = (SELECT lowest_avg_salary FROM lowest_salary_among_oldest)
  AND dp.type = 'OWNER';

WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.birth_date, d.A11
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
),
oldest_female AS (
    SELECT client_id, birth_date, A11
    FROM female_clients
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM female_clients)
),
salary_range AS (
    SELECT MIN(A11) AS lowest_salary, MAX(A11) AS highest_salary
    FROM oldest_female
)
SELECT 
    a.account_id,
    (SELECT highest_salary - lowest_salary FROM salary_range) AS salary_gap
FROM oldest_female ofc
JOIN disp dp ON ofc.client_id = dp.client_id AND dp.type = 'OWNER'
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE ofc.A11 = (SELECT lowest_salary FROM salary_range);

WITH target_district AS (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia'
    AND A4 = (
        SELECT MAX(A4)
        FROM district
        WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia'
    )
),
clients_in_target AS (
    SELECT c.gender
    FROM client c
    WHERE c.district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM target_district)
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN gender = 'M' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS male_percentage
FROM clients_in_target;

WITH target_district AS (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia'
      AND A4 = (
          SELECT MAX(A4)
          FROM district
          WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia'
      )
),
client_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_clients,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_clients
    FROM client c
    WHERE c.district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM target_district)
)
SELECT 
    (male_clients * 100.0 / total_clients) AS male_percentage
FROM client_counts;

WITH target_district AS (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia'
    ORDER BY A4 DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) AS male_percentage
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE a.district_id = (SELECT district_id FROM target_district);

WITH target_district AS (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia'
      AND A4 = (SELECT MAX(A4) FROM district WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia')
),
account_in_target AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM account
    WHERE district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM target_district)
),
owner_clients AS (
    SELECT d.client_id
    FROM disp d
    JOIN account_in_target a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
),
client_genders AS (
    SELECT c.gender
    FROM owner_clients oc
    JOIN client c ON oc.client_id = c.client_id
),
counts AS (
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_clients,
        SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_clients
    FROM client_genders
)
SELECT 
    male_clients * 100.0 / total_clients AS male_client_percentage
FROM counts;

WITH target_district AS (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia'
    ORDER BY A4 DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS male_client_percentage
FROM client c
WHERE c.district_id = (SELECT district_id FROM target_district);

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN status = 'C' THEN account_id END) * 100.0) 
        / COUNT(DISTINCT account_id), 
        2
    ) AS percentage_accounts_running
FROM loan
WHERE amount < 100000;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN status = 'C' THEN account_id END) * 100.0 / 
        COUNT(DISTINCT account_id), 
        2
    ) AS percentage_accounts_running_ok
FROM loan
WHERE amount < 100000;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*),
        2
    ) AS percentage_running_ok
FROM loan
WHERE amount < 100000;

WITH loans_under_100k AS (
    SELECT account_id, amount, status
    FROM loan
    WHERE amount < 100000
),
total_accounts AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS total_count
    FROM loans_under_100k
),
running_accounts AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS running_count
    FROM loans_under_100k
    WHERE status = 'C'
)
SELECT 
    (running_accounts.running_count * 100.0 / total_accounts.total_count) AS percentage
FROM total_accounts, running_accounts;

WITH loan_accounts AS (
    SELECT 
        account_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN status = 'C' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_good_status
    FROM loan
    WHERE amount < 100000
    GROUP BY account_id
),
total_accounts AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM loan_accounts
),
good_accounts AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS good_count FROM loan_accounts WHERE has_good_status = 1
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_count = 0 THEN NULL 
        ELSE ROUND(100.0 * good_count / total_count, 2) 
    END AS percentage
FROM total_accounts, good_accounts;

WITH first_approved_loan AS (
    SELECT loan_id, account_id
    FROM loan
    WHERE date = '1993-07-05' AND status = 'A'
    ORDER BY loan_id
    LIMIT 1
),
owner_client AS (
    SELECT d.client_id, fal.account_id
    FROM first_approved_loan fal
    JOIN disp d ON fal.account_id = d.account_id
    WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
),
balance_19930322 AS (
    SELECT t.balance
    FROM trans t
    JOIN owner_client oc ON t.account_id = oc.account_id
    WHERE t.date <= '1993-03-22'
    ORDER BY t.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
balance_19981227 AS (
    SELECT t.balance
    FROM trans t
    JOIN owner_client oc ON t.account_id = oc.account_id
    WHERE t.date <= '1998-12-27'
    ORDER BY t.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT balance FROM balance_19981227) AS balance_A,
    (SELECT balance FROM balance_19930322) AS balance_B,
    ROUND(
        ((SELECT balance FROM balance_19981227) - (SELECT balance FROM balance_19930322)) * 100.0 / 
        NULLIF((SELECT balance FROM balance_19930322), 0), 
        2
    ) AS increase_rate_percent
FROM owner_client;

WITH first_approved_loan AS (
    SELECT loan_id, account_id
    FROM loan
    WHERE date = '1993-07-05' AND status = 'A'
    ORDER BY loan_id
    LIMIT 1
),
account_owner AS (
    SELECT client_id
    FROM disp
    WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM first_approved_loan)
      AND type = 'OWNER'
),
balance_19930322 AS (
    SELECT balance
    FROM trans
    WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM first_approved_loan)
      AND date <= '1993-03-22'
    ORDER BY date DESC, trans_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
balance_19981227 AS (
    SELECT balance
    FROM trans
    WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM first_approved_loan)
      AND date <= '1998-12-27'
    ORDER BY date DESC, trans_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT balance FROM balance_19981227) AS balance_19981227,
    (SELECT balance FROM balance_19930322) AS balance_19930322,
    ROUND(
        (( (SELECT balance FROM balance_19981227) - (SELECT balance FROM balance_19930322) ) * 100.0 
        / (SELECT balance FROM balance_19930322)), 
        2
    ) AS increase_rate_percent
FROM first_approved_loan;

WITH target_loan AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM loan
    WHERE date = '1993-07-05'
      AND status = 'A'
    ORDER BY loan_id
    LIMIT 1
),
target_account AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM target_loan
),
target_client AS (
    SELECT client_id
    FROM disp
    WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM target_account)
      AND type = 'OWNER'
),
balance_1993 AS (
    SELECT balance
    FROM trans
    WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM target_account)
      AND date <= '1993-03-22'
    ORDER BY date DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
balance_1998 AS (
    SELECT balance
    FROM trans
    WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM target_account)
      AND date <= '1998-12-27'
    ORDER BY date DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT balance FROM balance_1998) AS balance_1998,
    (SELECT balance FROM balance_1993) AS balance_1993,
    CASE 
        WHEN (SELECT balance FROM balance_1993) IS NULL OR (SELECT balance FROM balance_1993) = 0 
        THEN NULL 
        ELSE ROUND((((SELECT balance FROM balance_1998) - (SELECT balance FROM balance_1993)) * 100.0 / (SELECT balance FROM balance_1993))::numeric, 2)
    END AS increase_rate_percent;

WITH first_approved_loan AS (
    SELECT loan_id, account_id
    FROM loan
    WHERE date = '1993-07-05'
      AND status = 'A'
    ORDER BY loan_id
    LIMIT 1
),
loan_account AS (
    SELECT fal.account_id, d.client_id
    FROM first_approved_loan fal
    JOIN disp d ON fal.account_id = d.account_id
    WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
),
balance_1993 AS (
    SELECT t.account_id, t.balance
    FROM trans t
    JOIN loan_account la ON t.account_id = la.account_id
    WHERE t.date <= '1993-03-22'
    ORDER BY t.date DESC, t.trans_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
balance_1998 AS (
    SELECT t.account_id, t.balance
    FROM trans t
    JOIN loan_account la ON t.account_id = la.account_id
    WHERE t.date <= '1998-12-27'
    ORDER BY t.date DESC, t.trans_id DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    la.client_id,
    la.account_id,
    b1993.balance AS balance_19930322,
    b1998.balance AS balance_19981227,
    ((b1998.balance - b1993.balance) * 100.0 / b1993.balance) AS increase_rate_percent
FROM loan_account la
LEFT JOIN balance_1993 b1993 ON la.account_id = b1993.account_id
LEFT JOIN balance_1998 b1998 ON la.account_id = b1998.account_id;

WITH first_approved_loan AS (
    SELECT loan_id, account_id
    FROM loan
    WHERE date = '1993-07-05'
      AND status = 'A'
    ORDER BY loan_id
    LIMIT 1
),
client_account AS (
    SELECT d.client_id, fal.account_id
    FROM first_approved_loan fal
    JOIN disp d ON fal.account_id = d.account_id
    WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
),
balance_on_date AS (
    SELECT 
        ca.client_id,
        ca.account_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN target_date = '1993-03-22' THEN balance END) AS balance_19930322,
        MAX(CASE WHEN target_date = '1998-12-27' THEN balance END) AS balance_19981227
    FROM client_account ca
    CROSS JOIN (SELECT '1993-03-22' AS target_date UNION ALL SELECT '1998-12-27') dates
    LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT t.balance
        FROM trans t
        WHERE t.account_id = ca.account_id
          AND t.date <= dates.target_date
        ORDER BY t.date DESC, t.trans_id DESC
        LIMIT 1
    ) t ON TRUE
    GROUP BY ca.client_id, ca.account_id
)
SELECT 
    client_id,
    account_id,
    balance_19930322,
    balance_19981227,
    CASE 
        WHEN balance_19930322 IS NOT NULL AND balance_19930322 != 0 
        THEN ((balance_19981227 - balance_19930322) * 100.0 / balance_19930322)
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS increase_rate_percent
FROM balance_on_date;

    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increment_percentage
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE l.status = 'D';

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS region,
    ((d.A14 - d.A13) / d.A13) * 100.0 AS unemployment_increment_percentage
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id AND dp.type = 'OWNER'
JOIN client c ON dp.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE l.status = 'D'
GROUP BY d.district_id, d.A2, d.A3, d.A13, d.A14

WITH male_loans AS (
    SELECT 
        l.loan_id,
        l.amount,
        strftime('%Y', l.date) AS loan_year
    FROM loan l
    INNER JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    INNER JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    INNER JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'M'
      AND (strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' OR strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997')
),
loan_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN loan_year = '1996' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_1996,
        SUM(CASE WHEN loan_year = '1997' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_1997
    FROM male_loans
)
SELECT 
    total_1996,
    total_1997,
    CASE 
        WHEN total_1996 = 0 THEN NULL 
        ELSE ROUND((total_1997 - total_1996) * 100.0 / total_1996, 2)
    END AS growth_rate_percent
FROM loan_totals;

WITH male_loans AS (
    SELECT 
        l.loan_id,
        l.amount,
        l.date,
        c.gender
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id AND d.type = 'OWNER'
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'M'
),
yearly_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', date) = '1996' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_1996,
        SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', date) = '1997' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_1997
    FROM male_loans
)
SELECT 
    total_1996,
    total_1997,
    (total_1997 - total_1996) * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_1996, 0) AS growth_rate_percent
FROM yearly_totals;

WITH male_accounts AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.account_id
    FROM disp d
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'M'
),
loan_1996 AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(l.amount), 0) AS total_1996
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM male_accounts)
      AND strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996'
),
loan_1997 AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(l.amount), 0) AS total_1997
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM male_accounts)
      AND strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997'
)
SELECT 
    total_1996,
    total_1997,
    CASE 
        WHEN total_1996 = 0 THEN NULL 
        ELSE ROUND((total_1997 - total_1996) * 100.0 / total_1996, 2)
    END AS growth_rate_percent
FROM loan_1996, loan_1997;

WITH male_loans AS (
    SELECT 
        l.loan_id,
        l.amount,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) AS loan_year,
        c.gender,
        d.type AS disp_type
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'M' 
      AND d.type = 'OWNER'
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) IN (1996, 1997)
),
yearly_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        loan_year,
        SUM(amount) AS total_amount
    FROM male_loans
    GROUP BY loan_year
),
pivoted AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN loan_year = 1996 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS sum_1996,
        SUM(CASE WHEN loan_year = 1997 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS sum_1997
    FROM yearly_totals
)
SELECT 
    sum_1996,
    sum_1997,
    CASE 
        WHEN sum_1996 = 0 THEN NULL 
        ELSE ROUND(((sum_1997 - sum_1996) * 100.0 / sum_1996), 2) 
    END AS growth_rate_percent
FROM pivoted;

WITH male_owner_accounts AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.account_id
    FROM disp d
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'M' AND d.type = 'OWNER'
),
loan_1996 AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(l.amount), 0) AS total_1996
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM male_owner_accounts)
      AND strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996'
),
loan_1997 AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(l.amount), 0) AS total_1997
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM male_owner_accounts)
      AND strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997'
)
SELECT 
    total_1996,
    total_1997,
    CASE 
        WHEN total_1996 = 0 THEN NULL 
        ELSE ROUND((total_1997 - total_1996) * 100.0 / total_1996, 2)
    END AS growth_rate_percent
FROM loan_1996, loan_1997;

WITH clients_in_high_salary_districts AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id
    FROM account a
    JOIN district di ON a.district_id = di.district_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    WHERE di.A11 > 10000
      AND d.type = 'OWNER'
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'F' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_female
FROM clients_in_high_salary_districts chsd
JOIN client c ON chsd.client_id = c.client_id;

WITH eligible_clients AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.gender
    FROM district d
    JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
    JOIN disp dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id
    JOIN client c ON dp.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE d.A11 > 10000
      AND dp.type = 'OWNER'
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_clients,
    SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS female_clients,
    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*),
        2
    ) AS female_percentage
FROM eligible_clients;

WITH high_salary_districts AS (
    SELECT district_id 
    FROM district 
    WHERE A11 > 10000
),
account_owners AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id
    FROM account a
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
      AND a.district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM high_salary_districts)
),
total_clients AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM account_owners
),
female_clients AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS female_count
    FROM account_owners ao
    JOIN client c ON ao.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN total_count = 0 THEN NULL 
        ELSE (female_count * 100.0 / total_count) 
    END AS percentage_women
FROM total_clients, female_clients;

WITH high_salary_districts AS (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A11 > 10000
),
accounts_in_those_districts AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM account
    WHERE district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM high_salary_districts)
),
owner_clients AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id
    FROM disp d
    WHERE d.account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM accounts_in_those_districts)
      AND d.type = 'OWNER'
),
female_owner_clients AS (
    SELECT oc.client_id
    FROM owner_clients oc
    JOIN client c ON oc.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM female_owner_clients) * 100.0 /
    NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM owner_clients), 0) AS percentage_female

WITH relevant_clients AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.gender
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id AND d.type = 'OWNER'
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN district di ON a.district_id = di.district_id
    WHERE di.A11 > 10000
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN gender = 'F' THEN client_id END) * 100.0 / 
     COUNT(DISTINCT client_id)) AS percentage_female
FROM relevant_clients;

SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
  AND d.type = 'OWNER'
GROUP BY c.client_id;

SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) - 
    (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' 
  AND d.type = 'OWNER'
GROUP BY c.client_id, c.birth_date;

SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date) AS INTEGER) -
        (CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', c.birth_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
  AND d.type = 'OWNER'
GROUP BY c.client_id, c.birth_date;

SELECT DISTINCT 
    c.client_id,
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) - 
    (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
  AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT DISTINCT 
    c.client_id,
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id AND d.type = 'OWNER'
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id AND ca.type = 'gold';

WITH oldest_female AS (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS oldest_birth_date
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
),
lowest_salary_among_oldest AS (
    SELECT MIN(d.A11) AS lowest_a11
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F' 
      AND c.birth_date = (SELECT oldest_birth_date FROM oldest_female)
)
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT oldest_birth_date FROM oldest_female)
  AND d.A11 = (SELECT lowest_a11 FROM lowest_salary_among_oldest)
  AND dp.type = 'OWNER'
ORDER BY a.account_id;

WITH female_owners AS (
    SELECT 
        c.client_id,
        c.birth_date,
        d.A11 AS avg_salary,
        a.account_id
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
    JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND dp.type = 'OWNER'
)
SELECT account_id
FROM female_owners
WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM female_owners)
  AND avg_salary = (
      SELECT MIN(avg_salary)
      FROM female_owners
      WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM female_owners)
  );

WITH female_owners AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.birth_date, d.account_id, dist.A11
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND d.type = 'OWNER'
),
oldest_females AS (
    SELECT * FROM female_owners
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM female_owners)
)
SELECT account_id
FROM oldest_females
WHERE A11 = (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM oldest_females);

WITH oldest_female AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.birth_date, d.A11
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
      AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
),
lowest_salary_among_oldest AS (
    SELECT MIN(A11) AS min_A11
    FROM oldest_female
)
SELECT DISTINCT disp.account_id
FROM oldest_female ofem
JOIN disp ON ofem.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN district d ON ofem.A11 = d.A11
WHERE ofem.A11 = (SELECT min_A11 FROM lowest_salary_among_oldest);

SELECT a.account_id
FROM client c
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND dp.type = 'OWNER'
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
  AND d.A11 = (
      SELECT MIN(d2.A11)
      FROM client c2
      JOIN disp dp2 ON c2.client_id = dp2.client_id
      JOIN account a2 ON dp2.account_id = a2.account_id
      JOIN district d2 ON c2.district_id = d2.district_id
      WHERE c2.gender = 'F'
        AND dp2.type = 'OWNER'
        AND c2.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F')
  );

SELECT 
    (SELECT frequency FROM account WHERE account_id = 3) AS statement_frequency,
    (SELECT k_symbol 
     FROM trans 
     WHERE account_id = 3 
       AND type = 'VYDAJ' 
     GROUP BY k_symbol 
     HAVING SUM(amount) = 3539 
     LIMIT 1) AS debit_purpose;

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS statement_request_count,
    k_symbol AS aim
FROM trans
WHERE account_id = 3 
  AND k_symbol IS NOT NULL
  AND k_symbol IN (
      SELECT k_symbol
      FROM trans
      WHERE account_id = 3 
        AND type = 'debit'
        AND k_symbol IS NOT NULL
      GROUP BY k_symbol
      HAVING SUM(amount) = 3539
  )
GROUP BY k_symbol;

SELECT 
    'Frequency of account statement requests' AS question,
    COUNT(*) AS answer
FROM trans
WHERE account_id = 3 AND k_symbol = 'SLUZBY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'Aim of debiting 3539 in total',
    k_symbol
FROM trans
WHERE account_id = 3 AND type = 'VYDAJ'
GROUP BY k_symbol
HAVING SUM(amount) = 3539;

-- Part 1: Count of statement requests for account 3 (assuming k_symbol='STMT' indicates statement request)
SELECT 
    'Statement request count' AS description,
    COUNT(*) AS value
FROM trans
WHERE account_id = 3 AND k_symbol = 'STMT'

UNION ALL

-- Part 2: Purpose (k_symbol) of debit transactions totaling 3539 for account 3
SELECT 
    'Debit purpose for total 3539' AS description,
    k_symbol AS value
FROM trans
WHERE account_id = 3 AND type = 'VYDAJ'
GROUP BY k_symbol
HAVING SUM(amount) = 3539;

WITH debit_aim AS (
    SELECT k_symbol
    FROM trans
    WHERE account_id = 3
      AND type = 'VYDAJ'
      AND k_symbol IS NOT NULL
      AND k_symbol != ''
    GROUP BY k_symbol
    HAVING SUM(amount) = 3539
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM trans 
     WHERE account_id = 3 
       AND k_symbol = (SELECT k_symbol FROM debit_aim)
    ) AS statement_request_frequency,
    (SELECT k_symbol FROM debit_aim) AS debit_aim_k_symbol;
